function.en: Responsible for land taxes, customs, timar registration, minting, budgets, and treasury income and expenditure

function.zh: 起草敕令、保存档案、管理帝国文书与对外往来
function.en: Drafted decrees, preserved archives, and managed imperial documentation and foreign correspondence

function.zh: 管理法官任命、宗教教育、伊斯兰法解释与宗教基金
function.en: Managed the appointment of judges, religious education, interpretation of Islamic law, and pious foundations

function.zh: 管理托普卡帕宫廷、内廷教育、禁卫军与御用事务
function.en: Managed the Topkapi palace, inner court education, household guards, and imperial service

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依托行省总督、桑贾克贝伊、卡迪与税务承包及采邑体制共同运作。司法与行政并行，中央通过巡察、登记册和任免制度维持控制。
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through provincial governors, sanjak-beys, qadis, and tax-farming and timar mechanisms. Judicial and administrative authority functioned in parallel, while the center maintained control through inspection, registers, and appointments.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系结合伊斯兰教法、苏丹敕令法和地方习惯。家族、婚姻和宗教事务多依教法审理，财政、刑政与土地管理则广泛依赖苏丹法令。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined Islamic sharia, sultanic law, and local custom. Family, marriage, and religious matters were often judged under religious law, while fiscal, criminal, and land administration relied heavily on sultanic regulations.

taxationSystem.zh: 主要税收包括土地税、农业什一税、畜税、人头税、关税、矿税和城市商业杂税。许多地区通过采邑分配税源，部分收入则直接归入国库或由包税人征收。
taxationSystem.en: Major taxes included land tax, agricultural tithe, livestock taxes, poll tax, customs duties, mining levies, and urban commercial imposts. In many areas revenues were assigned through timars, while other income went directly to the treasury or was collected by tax farmers.

religion.zh: 国家以逊尼派伊斯兰教为主导，但帝国内部长期容纳东正教、亚美尼亚教会、犹太教及其他宗教社群，在米利特雏形和地方自治中维持秩序。
religion.en: The state was dominated by Sunni Islam, yet the empire long accommodated Orthodox Christians, the Armenian Church, Judaism, and other communities, maintaining order through early millet-like arrangements and local autonomy.

philosophy.zh: 思想基础以伊斯兰法学、逊尼正统神学、波斯—伊斯兰政治文化和突厥王权传统为核心，同时受希腊—拜占庭遗产与苏菲修行影响。
philosophy.en: Its intellectual foundations centered on Islamic jurisprudence, Sunni orthodox theology, Perso-Islamic political culture, and Turkic traditions of kingship, while also reflecting Greek-Byzantine legacies and Sufi spirituality.

writingSystem.zh: 行政与文学主要使用奥斯曼土耳其语，采用阿拉伯字母书写；阿拉伯语用于宗教学术，波斯语在诗歌与宫廷文化中仍具重要地位。
writingSystem.en: Administration and literature primarily used Ottoman Turkish written in the Arabic script; Arabic served religious scholarship, while Persian remained important in poetry and court culture.

culturalAchievements.zh: 十五世纪末至十六世纪初的奥斯曼文化在建筑、书法、法学、史学和宫廷礼仪方面高度成熟。君士坦丁堡被改造为伊斯兰帝国首都，清真寺、宗教学校、浴场、市场和慈善建筑不断扩建；细密画、金饰手稿与宫廷音乐亦蓬勃发展。
culturalAchievements.en: By the late fifteenth and early sixteenth centuries, Ottoman culture was highly developed in architecture, calligraphy, jurisprudence, historiography, and court ceremony. Constantinople was being reshaped into an Islamic imperial capital through the expansion of mosques, madrasas, baths, markets, and charitable complexes; miniature painting, illuminated manuscripts, and court music also flourished.

languageFamily.zh: 统治语言属突厥语族，帝国内同时广泛使用希腊语、阿拉伯语、亚美尼亚语、斯拉夫语和阿尔巴尼亚语等
languageFamily.en: The ruling language belonged to the Turkic family, while Greek, Arabic, Armenian, Slavic languages, Albanian, and others were also widely spoken across the empire

gdpDescription.zh: 帝国经济总量位居当时世界前列，建立在巴尔干与安纳托利亚高产农业、地中海与黑海贸易、城市手工业、征服带来的财政整合以及连接欧亚非商路的地理优势之上。
gdpDescription.en: The empire’s overall economic output ranked among the largest in the world, built on productive Balkan and Anatolian agriculture, Mediterranean and Black Sea trade, urban crafts, fiscal integration resulting from conquest, and a strategic position linking Afro-Eurasian trade routes.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、畜牧、纺织、金属加工、造船、军械制造、陶瓷、皮革、地毯、染色和区域转口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, pastoralism, textiles, metalworking, shipbuilding, armaments manufacture, ceramics, leatherwork, carpets, dyeing, and regional entrepot trade

tradeGoods.zh: 谷物、羊毛、棉布、丝绸、皮革、地毯、铜铁制品、奴隶、香料转口品、木材、蜂蜡、盐和马匹
tradeGoods.en: Grain, wool, cotton textiles, silk, leather, carpets, copper and iron goods, slaves, re-exported spices, timber, beeswax, salt, and horses

householdWealth.zh: 普通农户财富主要体现在土地使用权、牲畜、农具和储粮；城市家庭则依赖作坊、库存、住房和行业行会网络。地区差异显著，巴尔干粮区与安纳托利亚商业城市相对富裕。
householdWealth.en: Ordinary rural household wealth lay chiefly in land-use rights, livestock, tools, and stored grain; urban families depended more on workshops, inventories, housing, and guild networks. Regional differences were significant, with grain-rich Balkan zones and commercial Anatolian cities relatively prosperous.

economicSystem.zh: 经济制度为国家监督下的农业税收经济与市场交换并存体制。帝国通过采邑、关税、行会管理、官方仓储与战略物资控制影响经济，但并未消灭私商与地方市场活力。
economicSystem.en: The economic system combined a state-supervised agrarian tax economy with active market exchange. The empire shaped economic life through timars, customs duties, guild regulation, official storage, and control over strategic goods, but did not eliminate private merchants or local market dynamism.

category.en: Roads, storage, relief, and miscellaneous spending

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库相对充实，既有现金储备，也有粮食、军需和贵金属储藏。巴耶济德二世时期总体财政较稳健，但战争、宫廷开支和铸币质量变化始终构成压力。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was relatively full, consisting of cash reserves as well as stocks of grain, military supplies, and precious metals. Under Bayezid II, overall finances were comparatively stable, though warfare, court expenditure, and changes in coin quality remained constant pressures.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调维持边疆军费、保护主要税源、保证城市供应和稳定货币流通。中央偏好渐进增收而非剧烈改革，并在需要时使用包税、征调和临时加派来应对支出。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized sustaining frontier military costs, protecting major revenue sources, securing urban supply, and maintaining monetary circulation. The central government generally preferred gradual revenue enhancement over drastic reform, using tax farming, requisitioning, and extraordinary levies when needed.

description.zh: 直属苏丹的精锐常备步兵，训练有素，装备火器与冷兵器，是中央军核心
description.en: Elite standing infantry directly attached to the sultan, well trained and equipped with firearms and melee weapons, forming the core of the central army

description.zh: 由苏丹直属骑兵与宫廷军构成，承担护卫、突击和战场机动任务
description.en: Comprised of the sultan’s household cavalry and court troops, serving in guard, shock, and battlefield maneuver roles

description.zh: 帝国军力主体，由持有采邑的骑兵在战时率随从应征，覆盖各行省
description.en: The main body of imperial military strength, made up of timar-holding cavalry who reported for service with retainers in wartime across the provinces

description.zh: 负责火炮操作、攻城、铸炮、筑垒和军械运输，体现奥斯曼攻城技术优势
description.en: Responsible for artillery operation, siegecraft, cannon casting, fortification work, and transport, reflecting Ottoman strength in siege warfare

description.zh: 以桨帆战船、水手、海军步兵和港口军官组成，活跃于爱琴海、东地中海与黑海
description.en: Composed of oared warships, sailors, naval infantry, and port officers, active in the Aegean, eastern Mediterranean, and Black Sea

name.zh: 地方守军与边境辅助军

description.zh: 包括阿金哲轻骑、边疆守军和各类辅助部队，用于侦察、袭扰与守备
description.en: Included akinci light cavalry, frontier garrisons, and various auxiliaries used for reconnaissance, raiding, and local defense

commanderInChief.zh: 苏丹巴耶济德二世（战时），平时由大维齐尔与高级帕夏分掌军政
commanderInChief.en: Sultan Bayezid II in wartime, with the grand vizier and senior pashas exercising major military-administrative authority in peacetime

technology.zh: 奥斯曼军队在火炮、攻城术、军械制造和常备步兵制度方面居同时代前列。火绳枪与大型攻城炮已普遍用于要塞作战，但野战中骑兵仍占重要地位。
technology.en: The Ottoman military ranked among the foremost of its age in artillery, siegecraft, armaments production, and standing infantry organization. Matchlock firearms and large siege guns were widely used in fortress warfare, though cavalry still played a major role in field combat.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自西方的匈牙利与其他中欧基督教势力、地中海上的威尼斯海军竞争，以及东方不断增长的萨法维宗教与政治挑战。
threats.en: Major threats came from Hungary and other central European Christian powers in the west, Venetian naval rivalry in the Mediterranean, and the growing political and religious challenge of the Safavids in the east.

populationDescription.zh: 帝国人口庞大且高度多样，主要集中于巴尔干、安纳托利亚、鲁米利亚诸平原和大城市周边。穆斯林人口不断增加，但基督徒与犹太社群仍占重要比例，形成多民族多宗教帝国结构。
populationDescription.en: The empire’s population was large and highly diverse, concentrated especially in the Balkans, Anatolia, Rumelia’s plains, and around major cities. The Muslim population was growing, but Christians and Jews still formed substantial communities, creating a multiethnic and multireligious imperial structure.

socialClasses.zh: 主要社会阶层包括宫廷与军政精英、乌理玛与法官、行会商人与工匠、城市平民、农民、游牧与半游牧部族、非穆斯林宗教共同体以及被役使的奴隶与俘虏人口。
socialClasses.en: Major social classes included court and military-administrative elites, ulema and judges, guild merchants and artisans, urban commoners, peasants, nomadic and semi-nomadic tribes, non-Muslim religious communities, and enslaved or captive populations.

allies.zh: 奥斯曼在1500年前后并无稳定意义上的长期盟国，但与部分意大利城邦、黑海附庸与边疆属国保持务实关系；法国式的正式反哈布斯堡联盟尚未形成。
allies.en: Around 1500 the Ottomans had no stable long-term allies in the later sense, but maintained pragmatic relations with some Italian city-states, Black Sea dependents, and frontier tributaries; a formal Franco-Ottoman anti-Habsburg alignment had not yet emerged.

enemies.zh: 主要敌对者包括威尼斯共和国、匈牙利王国、若干巴尔干基督教边疆势力，以及东方正在崛起并煽动安纳托利亚什叶派网络的萨法维力量。
enemies.en: Principal enemies included the Republic of Venice, the Kingdom of Hungary, various Christian frontier powers in the Balkans, and the rising Safavid power in the east, which was stirring Shi'i networks in Anatolia.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以维护巴尔干优势、压制地中海海上竞争、控制黑海贸易圈并防范伊朗高原方向的新兴对手为核心。奥斯曼同时善于利用和约、附庸关系、贸易特权与军事威慑并行施策。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on preserving dominance in the Balkans, suppressing Mediterranean maritime rivals, controlling the Black Sea commercial sphere, and guarding against emerging opponents from the Iranian plateau. The Ottomans skillfully combined treaties, tributary relations, commercial privileges, and military deterrence.

era.zh: 文艺复兴时代

keyInnovations.zh: 关键优势包括大型火炮铸造、火绳枪步兵制度、攻城工程、地中海桨帆舰建造、精密文书档案管理和结合伊斯兰与拜占庭传统的城市基础设施建设。
keyInnovations.en: Key strengths included large-scale cannon casting, matchlock infantry organization, siege engineering, Mediterranean galley construction, sophisticated chancery recordkeeping, and urban infrastructure drawing on both Islamic and Byzantine traditions.

militaryTechnology.zh: 军事技术欧亚领先：奥斯曼帝国拥有当时最先进的攻城炮技术，乌尔班大炮在1453年攻破君士坦丁堡城墙改写历史。禁卫军（耶尼切里）是全球最早的常备职业军队之一。火器应用水平高于大多数欧洲国家。
militaryTechnology.en: Eurasian military technology leader: the Ottoman Empire possesses the era's most advanced siege artillery; Orban's great cannon breached Constantinople's walls in 1453, rewriting history. Janissaries are among the world's earliest standing professional armies. Firearms usage exceeds most European states.

architectureAndEngineering.zh: 建筑与工程宏伟：锡南大师（即将活跃）将设计苏莱曼清真寺等伊斯兰建筑杰作。奥斯曼水利工程和城市供水系统技术先进。伊斯坦布尔大巴扎是全球最大的室内市场。
architectureAndEngineering.en: Grand architecture and engineering: Master Sinan (about to become active) will design Islamic architectural masterpieces including the Süleymaniye Mosque. Ottoman hydraulic engineering and urban water supply systems are technologically advanced. Istanbul's Grand Bazaar is the world's largest covered market.

overallAssessment.zh: 1500年的奥斯曼帝国正处于苏莱曼大帝时代（即将到来）的巅峰前夜，在军事技术和建筑工程方面领先欧亚。攻城炮和常备军体制是其军事优势的核心。但奥斯曼帝国对印刷术持保守态度（直到18世纪才允许土耳其语印刷），这将成为长期科技停滞的关键因素之一。
overallAssessment.en: The Ottoman Empire in 1500 is on the eve of its zenith under Suleiman the Magnificent (imminent), leading Eurasia in military technology and architectural engineering. Siege artillery and the standing army system are the core of its military advantage. But the Ottoman conservative attitude toward printing (Turkish-language printing not permitted until the 18th century) will become a key factor in long-term technological stagnation.

strengths.zh: 帝国在1500年处于强盛期，拥有卓越的地缘位置、庞大人口、稳定税源、精锐常备军、成熟行政体系和能够整合多民族地区的政治能力。
strengths.en: In 1500 the empire was in a strong phase, possessing an outstanding strategic location, a large population, dependable revenue sources, elite standing forces, a mature administrative apparatus, and the political capacity to integrate many ethnic regions.

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点在于王位继承不稳、中央与地方利益时常冲突、对军事扩张财政的长期依赖，以及东部宗教政治动员可能引发的内部动荡。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses lay in uncertain succession, frequent tensions between central and provincial interests, long-term dependence on expansionary military finance, and the possibility of internal unrest triggered by eastern religious-political mobilization.

outlook.zh: 总体前景极为乐观。若能控制东部萨法维挑战并维持财政与军制平衡，奥斯曼帝国将在未来数十年继续向东欧、阿拉伯地区和地中海扩张，成为近代早期世界最重要的超级强权之一。
outlook.en: The overall outlook was highly favorable. If it could contain the Safavid challenge in the east and preserve balance in finance and military organization, the Ottoman Empire would continue expanding into eastern Europe, the Arab lands, and the Mediterranean, becoming one of the foremost superpowers of the early modern world.

description.zh: 奥斯曼帝国横跨巴尔干与安纳托利亚，是欧亚交界最强大帝国之一。
description.en: Spanning the Balkans and Anatolia, the Ottoman Empire was one of the most powerful states of the Afro-Eurasian world.

ideology.zh: 中央集权、德夫希尔梅制度与逊尼正统
ideology.en: Centralized administration, devshirme system, and Sunni orthodoxy

headquarters.zh: 君士坦丁堡·托普卡帕宫

relationship.zh: 巴耶济德二世是征服者穆罕默德二世之子，1481年在与弟弟杰姆的继承战争中获胜即位。与其父的激进扩张主义不同，巴耶济德采取相对保守温和的治国路线，注重内政建设和逊尼正统。他通过德夫希尔梅制度持续招募基督徒男孩充实帝国行政和军事体系，维持了奥斯曼独特的精英培养机制。
relationship.en: Bayezid II, son of Mehmed the Conqueror, took the throne in 1481 after winning the succession war against his brother Jem. Unlike his father's aggressive expansionism, Bayezid pursued a relatively conservative and moderate governing approach, focusing on domestic administration and Sunni orthodoxy. He continued recruiting Christian boys through the devshirme system to replenish the imperial administrative and military apparatus, maintaining the Ottoman Empire's distinctive elite cultivation mechanism.

description.zh: 巴耶济德二世（1447-1512）是奥斯曼帝国第八任苏丹，在位期间（1481-1512）帝国处于从征服期向巩固期的过渡阶段。他在继位之初就面临弟弟杰姆苏丹的叛乱，杰姆出逃至基督教欧洲后成为西方要挟奥斯曼的人质。巴耶济德以虔诚著称，大力赞助清真寺、经学院和苏菲道堂的建设，伊斯坦布尔在其治下成为伊斯兰世界的文化重镇。他的行政体系以大维齐尔为核心，帝国divan（御前会议）定期处理帝国事务。然而到1500年前后，他的统治权威开始受到挑战——三个儿子之间的继承竞争日趋激烈，特别是最具野心的塞利姆对父亲的温和路线深感不满。奥斯曼帝国在此期间虽未大举扩张，但通过海军建设和贸易控制巩固了地中海东部的霸权地位。
description.en: Bayezid II (1447–1512) was the eighth Ottoman sultan, ruling during a transitional period (1481–1512) from conquest to consolidation. He faced his brother Jem Sultan's rebellion immediately upon succession; Jem's flight to Christian Europe made him a hostage Western powers used to pressure the Ottomans. Known for piety, Bayezid generously patronized mosques, madrasas, and Sufi lodges, making Istanbul a cultural center of the Islamic world. His administrative system centered on the Grand Vizier, with the Imperial Divan regularly conducting state business. By around 1500, however, his authority was increasingly challenged—succession competition among his three sons intensified, especially from the most ambitious, Selim, who deeply resented his father's moderate approach. Though the empire did not expand significantly during this period, it consolidated its eastern Mediterranean hegemony through naval construction and trade control.

role.zh: 奥斯曼帝国保守派统治者，注重内政与宗教建设
role.en: Conservative Ottoman ruler, focused on domestic affairs and religious construction

name.zh: 赫尔塞克扎德·艾哈迈德帕夏

role.zh: 波斯尼亚裔德夫希尔梅出身的首席大臣
role.en: Chief minister of Bosnian devshirme origin

ideology.zh: 军事精英特权与贝克塔什苏菲传统
ideology.en: Military elite privilege and Bektashi Sufi tradition

headquarters.zh: 君士坦丁堡禁卫军营地

relationship.zh: 禁卫军是奥斯曼帝国最精锐的常备军事力量，也是帝国政治的关键角色。他们通过德夫希尔梅制度从基督徒少年中征选训练而成，理论上完全效忠苏丹。然而到15世纪末，禁卫军已开始发展自身的机构利益和政治影响力，成为苏丹即位和废黜过程中不可忽视的力量。
relationship.en: The Janissaries were the Ottoman Empire's most elite standing military force and key political players. Recruited and trained from Christian boys through the devshirme system, they were theoretically loyal solely to the sultan. By the late 15th century, however, the Janissaries had begun developing institutional interests and political influence, becoming an indispensable force in the process of enthroning and deposing sultans.

description.zh: 禁卫军（耶尼切里）是奥斯曼帝国最独特的军事制度之一，由通过德夫希尔梅（'少年征募'）制度从巴尔干基督徒家庭征选的少年组成，经过严格的伊斯兰教育和军事训练后成为帝国最精锐的步兵力量。到1500年左右，禁卫军兵力约为一万至一万二千人，配备当时最先进的火器，是欧洲最早的常备火枪部队之一。禁卫军信奉贝克塔什教团的苏菲伊斯兰传统，形成了独特的军事-宗教文化。在政治上，禁卫军的即位赏赐（cülus bahşişi）已成为苏丹登基的惯例——新苏丹必须向禁卫军发放大量赏金以换取效忠。这种惯例使禁卫军逐渐获得了'造王者'的角色。在巴耶济德二世统治期间，禁卫军总体上保持了对苏丹的忠诚，但在即将到来的继承危机中，他们的立场将成为决定性因素。
description.en: The Janissaries (Yeniçeri) were one of the Ottoman Empire's most distinctive military institutions, composed of boys conscripted from Balkan Christian families through the devshirme ('child levy') system. After rigorous Islamic education and military training, they became the empire's most elite infantry. By around 1500, the Janissary Corps numbered ten to twelve thousand, equipped with the most advanced firearms of the era, among Europe's earliest standing musket forces. They followed the Bektashi Sufi order's Islamic tradition, forming a unique military-religious culture. Politically, the accession bonus (cülus bahşişi) had become customary—new sultans were required to distribute large sums to the Janissaries in exchange for loyalty. This practice gradually gave them the role of 'kingmakers.' During Bayezid II's reign, the Janissaries generally remained loyal, but their stance would prove decisive in the coming succession crisis.

role.zh: 禁卫军最高指挥官，直接向苏丹负责
role.en: Supreme commander of the Janissaries, directly answerable to the sultan

ideology.zh: 军事扩张主义、反萨法维与积极逊尼政策
ideology.en: Military expansionism, anti-Safavid stance, and active Sunni policy

relationship.zh: 塞利姆是巴耶济德二世三子中最具野心和军事才能的一位。他对父亲的温和保守路线深感不满，尤其批评巴耶济德对波斯萨法维王朝在安纳托利亚东部扩张什叶派影响力的放任态度。塞利姆积极联络禁卫军和边境军事力量，为夺取皇位做准备。
relationship.en: Selim was the most ambitious and militarily talented of Bayezid II's three sons. He deeply resented his father's moderate conservative approach, particularly criticizing Bayezid's tolerance of the Safavid dynasty's expansion of Shiite influence in eastern Anatolia. Selim actively courted the Janissaries and frontier military forces, preparing to seize the throne.

description.zh: 塞利姆（1470-1520，后为塞利姆一世'冷酷者'）是巴耶济德二世最小的儿子，也是三位竞争继承权的王子中最危险的一位。他的两个兄弟——艾哈迈德（安纳托利亚总督）和科尔库特（安塔利亚总督）——分别代表了行政派和文艺派路线，而塞利姆则代表了激进的军事扩张路线。作为特拉布宗总督，塞利姆驻守帝国东北前线，直面波斯萨法维王朝伊斯玛仪一世在安纳托利亚的什叶派宣传活动和军事威胁。他认为父亲的不作为正在让帝国面临从内部被什叶派瓦解的危险。1500年前后，三子之间的继承竞争已公开化，塞利姆通过展示军事才能和对逊尼正统的坚定承诺来赢得禁卫军的支持。1512年他最终发动政变迫使父亲退位，随后在查尔迪兰战役（1514）中击败萨法维波斯，并在1516-1517年征服马穆鲁克埃及，将帝国领土扩大一倍。
description.en: Selim (1470–1520, later Selim I 'the Grim') was Bayezid II's youngest son and the most dangerous among the three princes competing for succession. His two brothers—Ahmed (Governor of Anatolia) and Korkut (Governor of Antalya)—represented administrative and literary approaches respectively, while Selim embodied radical military expansionism. As Governor of Trabzon, Selim was stationed at the empire's northeastern frontier, directly confronting the Safavid Shah Ismail I's Shiite proselytizing and military threats in Anatolia. He believed his father's inaction was allowing the empire to be undermined from within by Shiite subversion. By around 1500, the succession competition among the three sons had become open, with Selim winning Janissary support by demonstrating military prowess and firm commitment to Sunni orthodoxy. In 1512 he ultimately staged a coup forcing his father's abdication, then defeated Safavid Persia at Chaldiran (1514) and conquered Mamluk Egypt in 1516–1517, doubling the empire's territory.

role.zh: 野心勃勃的继承人，未来的'冷酷者'塞利姆一世
role.en: Ambitious heir, the future Selim I 'the Grim'

role.zh: 塞利姆的主要竞争对手，巴耶济德最初属意的继承人
role.en: Selim's main rival, Bayezid's initially preferred successor

governmentForm.zh: 强化中的封建-王室官僚君主制，依靠王室议会、财政法院与郡治体系统治全国
governmentForm.en: A strengthening feudal-royal bureaucratic monarchy, ruling the realm through the royal council, fiscal courts, and the county system

socialStructure.zh: 社会由国王、世俗与教会贵族、乡绅、城市商人与行会成员、佃农与自由农、雇工及贫民构成；15世纪末玫瑰战争后，大贵族势力相对削弱，乡绅与王室任命官员的重要性上升
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the king, secular and ecclesiastical nobility, gentry, urban merchants and guild members, tenants and free peasants, laborers, and the poor; after the Wars of the Roses, the great magnates were relatively weakened, while the gentry and crown-appointed officials grew in importance

rulingClass.zh: 都铎王室、主教与世俗贵族、枢密顾问、财政与司法高官，以及在地方治理中发挥关键作用的乡绅阶层
rulingClass.en: The Tudor monarchy, bishops and lay nobility, privy councillors, senior fiscal and judicial officers, and the gentry who played a crucial role in local governance

succession.zh: 父系世袭君主制，原则上由合法男性继承人为先；但15世纪的王位争夺使王朝合法性同时依赖议会确认、贵族支持与军事胜利
succession.en: Patrilineal hereditary monarchy, in principle favoring legitimate male heirs; yet the fifteenth-century succession struggles meant dynastic legitimacy also depended on parliamentary recognition, noble support, and military success

structure.zh: 中央政府以国王为核心，经由王室议会、枢密顾问集团、财政署、国库法院、星室法庭、王座法庭、普通诉讼法庭与衡平体系运作；地方则由郡长、治安法官、验尸官、市政官与教区网络执行政令
structure.en: Central government revolved around the king, operating through the royal council, a privy advisory circle, the Exchequer, Court of Treasury, Star Chamber, King's Bench, Court of Common Pleas, and the equity system; locally, royal orders were carried out by sheriffs, justices of the peace, coroners, municipal officers, and parish networks

function.zh: 为国王提供政务、司法、外交与安全建议，协调中央行政与重大案件审理
function.en: Advised the king on governance, justice, diplomacy, and security, and coordinated central administration and major legal cases

function.zh: 管理王室常规收入、租地、关税、审计与账册，监督税收征解
function.en: Managed ordinary crown revenue, rents, customs, audits, and records, and supervised tax collection

function.zh: 以更灵活的内廷财政方式直接处理国王收入与支出，是亨利七世强化财政控制的重要工具
function.en: Handled the king's receipts and expenditures through a more flexible household-based financial system, a key instrument of Henry VII's tighter fiscal control

function.zh: 征收羊毛、呢绒与进口货物关税，监管主要港口贸易
function.en: Collected customs on wool, cloth, and imported goods, and regulated trade at major ports

function.zh: 包括王座法庭、普通诉讼法庭、衡平与星室体系，处理刑事、民事与特权案件
function.en: Included King's Bench, Common Pleas, equity, and Star Chamber structures, handling criminal, civil, and privileged cases

function.zh: 通过郡长、治安法官与郡法庭维持治安、司法、征税与征召
function.en: Maintained order, justice, taxation, and musters through sheriffs, justices of the peace, and county courts

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以郡为核心，国王任命郡长并依赖乡绅出任治安法官；自治城市拥有市长、参事会与行会体系；教区也承担救济、登记与基层治理功能
localAdmin.en: Local administration centered on the county, with the king appointing sheriffs and relying on the gentry as justices of the peace; chartered towns had mayors, councils, and guild structures; parishes also handled relief, record-keeping, and grassroots governance

legalSystem.zh: 以普通法为主，辅以衡平法、教会法与王室特权司法；陪审团审理、巡回法官与成文敕令并行，星室法庭尤其用于打击权贵私斗与违法庇护
legalSystem.en: The system was based chiefly on common law, supplemented by equity, canon law, and royal prerogative justice; jury trial, itinerant justices, and written ordinances coexisted, with Star Chamber especially used to curb noble violence and unlawful maintenance

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入主要来自王室地产、封建权利、关税、司法罚金、议会批准的非常税与债券担保；亨利七世偏好以王室常规收入和严格征收减少对议会直接课税的依赖
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from crown lands, feudal dues, customs, judicial fines, parliamentary extraordinary taxation, and bonds and recognizances; Henry VII preferred to reduce reliance on direct parliamentary taxation by strengthening ordinary crown revenues and enforcing collection rigorously

religion.zh: 以拉丁基督教中的罗马天主教为国教，修道院、教区与主教区网络深植社会生活，朝圣、弥撒、圣徒崇拜与教会节期仍极为重要
religion.en: Roman Catholicism within Latin Christianity was the established religion, and the networks of monasteries, parishes, and dioceses were deeply embedded in social life; pilgrimage, the mass, saintly devotion, and the church calendar remained highly important

philosophy.zh: 思想上以经院神学、基督教伦理与初步文艺复兴人文主义并存；牛津与剑桥中逐渐出现对古典拉丁文、修辞与治理技艺的更高重视
philosophy.en: Intellectual life combined scholastic theology, Christian moral thought, and early Renaissance humanism; at Oxford and Cambridge there was growing attention to classical Latin, rhetoric, and the arts of governance

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁字母；行政与教会文书常用拉丁文，法律领域保留法律法语传统，英语在宫廷、商业与文学中的地位持续上升
writingSystem.en: The Latin alphabet was used; administrative and ecclesiastical documents were often in Latin, the legal sphere retained Law French traditions, and English continued to rise in status in courtly, commercial, and literary use

culturalAchievements.zh: 英格兰在15世纪末至16世纪初的文化成就包括威斯敏斯特印刷业的发展、教堂建筑和晚期垂直式哥特风格、王室礼仪的强化，以及以托马斯·马洛礼俗文学和晚中世纪宗教戏剧为代表的文学传统
culturalAchievements.en: England's cultural achievements in the late fifteenth and early sixteenth centuries included the growth of printing at Westminster, church building in the late Perpendicular Gothic style, the strengthening of royal ceremony, and literary traditions represented by works such as those associated with Thomas Malory and late medieval religious drama

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属西日耳曼语支的英语；上层文化同时深受拉丁语与法语传统影响
languageFamily.en: The main language was English, part of the West Germanic branch; elite culture was also strongly shaped by Latin and French traditions

gdpDescription.zh: 1500年前后的英格兰经济以农业为主，但已明显商业化，羊毛与呢绒出口对国民财富极为关键；伦敦的市场集散、东南部的商品农业、港口贸易和财政集中度使其在欧洲中属于中上水平王国经济
gdpDescription.en: Around 1500 the English economy remained primarily agricultural but was already strongly commercialized, with wool and especially cloth exports central to national wealth; London's market concentration, commercial farming in the southeast, port trade, and growing fiscal centralization made it a middle-to-upper-tier kingdom economy by European standards

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物与畜牧农业、养羊、毛纺与呢绒制造、皮革、采锡与采铅、渔业、酿酒、造船与港口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Arable and pastoral agriculture, sheep raising, woolen cloth production, leatherworking, tin and lead mining, fisheries, brewing, shipbuilding, and port commerce

tradeGoods.zh: 出口呢绒、原毛、锡、铅、皮革；进口葡萄酒、盐、香料、丝绸、优质金属制品、染料与奢侈品
tradeGoods.en: Exports included cloth, raw wool, tin, lead, and leather; imports included wine, salt, spices, silk, fine metal goods, dyestuffs, and luxury wares

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异极大。乡绅和富商可拥有土地、租金收益、现金储备和银器；普通农户多以土地使用权、牲畜、农具和粮食储备为主要资产，抗风险能力有限
householdWealth.en: Household wealth varied greatly. Gentry and prosperous merchants could hold land, rental income, cash reserves, and silver plate; ordinary peasant households mainly possessed land-use rights, livestock, tools, and grain stores, with limited resilience against hardship

economicSystem.zh: 以封建土地关系为基础、但日益货币化和市场化的混合经济；王室通过关税、特许公司、港口监管和对羊毛-呢绒出口的控制参与经济治理
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy based on feudal land relations but increasingly monetized and market-oriented; the crown participated in economic governance through customs, chartered companies, port regulation, and oversight of the wool-cloth export trade

source.zh: 封建权利、监护权与婚姻税
source.en: Feudal dues, wardships, and marriage rights

source.zh: 司法罚金、债券与担保金
议会非常税与其他杂项

category.zh: 债务清偿、赏赐与杂项储备
category.en: Debt repayment, patronage, and miscellaneous reserves

treasuryDescription.zh: 到亨利七世晚期，王室储备显著优于内战时代。国王通过恢复王室地产、谨慎支出、严密审计与债券制度积累了可观现金与贵金属储备，但部分资产并非完全流动且带有政治强制色彩
treasuryDescription.en: By the later part of Henry VII's reign, crown reserves were markedly stronger than in the civil-war era. Through restoring crown lands, careful spending, strict audit, and the bond system, the king accumulated substantial cash and bullion reserves, though part of these assets was not fully liquid and carried a coercive political character

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体保守、积累导向且强调王权独立财源。亨利七世力图以常规收入、海关、罚金与封建权利维持财政稳健，避免频繁向议会求税，同时也因征敛严苛而招致不满
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally conservative, accumulation-oriented, and focused on independent royal income. Henry VII sought to preserve solvency through ordinary revenues, customs, fines, and feudal rights while avoiding frequent parliamentary taxation, though the rigor of collection also bred resentment

description.zh: 规模不大，主要负责宫廷警卫、王室安全和战时核心指挥护卫
description.en: Small in number, mainly responsible for court security, royal protection, and a core wartime command guard

description.zh: 战时依靠郡级征召和贵族、乡绅动员，是英格兰军力主体，但训练和装备水平差异较大
description.en: Raised in wartime through county musters and noble and gentry mobilization, these formed the bulk of English manpower, though training and equipment varied widely

description.zh: 长弓传统仍具象征与战术价值，配合长柄武器步兵构成英军主要野战兵种
description.en: The longbow tradition still retained symbolic and tactical value, combining with polearm infantry as the main field arm of English forces

description.zh: 尚非后世常设皇家海军，但王室已开始重视造船与舰只储备，可在需要时动员商船和少量王室舰船执行巡防与护航
description.en: Not yet the permanent Royal Navy of later centuries, but the crown had begun to invest in shipbuilding and naval reserves, enabling it to mobilize merchant shipping and a small number of royal vessels for patrol and escort

commanderInChief.zh: 亨利七世国王
commanderInChief.en: King Henry VII

technology.zh: 军事技术处于中世纪晚期向早期火器时代过渡阶段，继续使用长弓、甲胄骑兵、长柄兵器，并逐步采用火绳枪前身、手铳和攻城火炮；港防与舰船火炮仍在发展中
technology.en: Military technology was in transition from the late medieval to the early gunpowder age, continuing to use longbows, armored cavalry, and polearms while gradually adopting early handguns and siege artillery; coastal defenses and shipboard artillery were still developing

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自苏格兰边境、与法国关系反复引发的海峡对峙、约克派流亡者和僭称者的外援阴谋，以及爱尔兰地区的不稳定
threats.en: Main threats came from the Scottish border, recurring cross-Channel tensions linked to France, Yorkist exiles and pretenders backed from abroad, and instability in Ireland

populationDescription.zh: 1500年前后的英格兰人口仍处于黑死病后长期恢复阶段，规模明显低于14世纪初峰值，但已重现增长。人口分布以乡村为主，东南部与中部农业区较稠密，北部和边地较稀疏
populationDescription.en: Around 1500 England's population was still in a long post-Black Death recovery, clearly below the early fourteenth-century peak but growing again. Settlement remained predominantly rural, with denser populations in the southeast and Midlands and thinner settlement in the north and borderlands

socialClasses.zh: 主要阶层包括王室与高等贵族、主教和修道院领袖、骑士与乡绅、城市商人和行会工匠、自由农与佃农、雇农与无地劳工，以及依赖教区和施舍的贫民
socialClasses.en: Major social groups included the monarchy and high nobility, bishops and monastic leaders, knights and gentry, urban merchants and guild craftsmen, free peasants and tenants, hired farm laborers and the landless, and the poor dependent on parish and charitable support

allies.zh: 英格兰在1500年前后没有持久固定盟友，但通过与西班牙的婚姻联盟、与勃艮第-低地国家的商业安排，以及阶段性与神圣罗马帝国和阿拉贡的合作维持均势
allies.en: Around 1500 England had no permanent fixed allies, but maintained balance through a marriage alliance with Spain, commercial arrangements with Burgundy-the Low Countries, and periodic cooperation with the Holy Roman Empire and Aragon

enemies.zh: 主要对手是苏格兰王国与法国王国；此外，支持珀金·沃贝克等僭称者的外国宫廷也被视为潜在敌对力量
enemies.en: Its principal rivals were the Kingdom of Scotland and the Kingdom of France; foreign courts backing pretenders such as Perkin Warbeck were also regarded as hostile forces

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以王朝安全、贸易利益和欧陆均势为核心。亨利七世偏好谨慎现实主义，通过婚姻、条约、有限战争、贸易禁运与外交斡旋确保都铎王朝合法性并避免代价高昂的大陆冒险
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on dynastic security, commercial interests, and the continental balance of power. Henry VII favored cautious realism, using marriage, treaties, limited war, trade embargoes, and diplomacy to secure Tudor legitimacy while avoiding costly continental adventures

era.zh: 文艺复兴早期与晚期中世纪向近代早期过渡阶段
era.en: Early Renaissance and the transitional phase from the late medieval to the early modern world

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术与制度进展包括印刷术在英格兰的扩散、会计与档案管理改进、远洋与沿海航运技术提升、火药武器逐步普及，以及毛纺生产和城市商业金融工具的持续发展
keyInnovations.en: Key technological and institutional developments included the spread of printing in England, improved accounting and record administration, advances in seagoing and coastal shipping, gradual diffusion of gunpowder weapons, and continued development of woolen manufacture and urban commercial-financial tools

strengths.zh: 优势在于王权在内战后显著恢复、财政管理趋于稳健、伦敦与呢绒出口带来商业活力、地方乡绅网络能够以较低成本支撑治理，且岛国地理有利于防御
strengths.en: Its strengths lay in the marked recovery of royal authority after civil war, increasingly sound fiscal management, commercial dynamism generated by London and the cloth export trade, a gentry-based local network that supported governance at relatively low cost, and the defensive advantage of island geography

weaknesses.zh: 弱点在于常备军规模很小、对呢绒出口和低地市场依赖较深、边境与爱尔兰治理并不稳固，财政虽改善但仍不足以支持长期大规模欧陆战争
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses included a very small standing army, deep dependence on cloth exports and Low Countries markets, insecure control of the borders and Ireland, and finances that, though improved, were still insufficient for sustained large-scale continental war

outlook.zh: 1500年的英格兰前景总体乐观。若都铎王朝能维持继承稳定、继续整顿财政并谨慎处理对法对苏关系，英格兰将逐步成长为更集中、更富裕、海上能力更强的王国；但一旦王位继承、宗教统一或对外战争失控，现有稳定仍可能迅速动摇
outlook.en: England's outlook in 1500 was broadly favorable. If the Tudor dynasty maintained stable succession, continued fiscal reform, and handled relations with France and Scotland prudently, England was likely to develop into a more centralized, wealthier, and more maritime-capable kingdom; yet instability in succession, religious unity, or foreign war could still quickly unsettle this stability

description.zh: 都铎王朝初期的英格兰正逐渐加强王权与财政控制。
description.en: Under the early Tudors, England was gradually strengthening royal power and fiscal administration.

governmentForm.zh: 封建君主制，王权在文艺复兴时期逐步加强，并依赖议会、枢密院与地方贵族治理全国
governmentForm.en: Feudal monarchy with strengthening royal authority in the Renaissance period, relying on parliament, privy council, and regional nobility to govern the realm

socialStructure.zh: 社会分为王室与高级贵族、教士、地主骑士与乡绅、自治市市民、佃农与农民，以及高地氏族社会中的族长与附庸成员；低地与高地在制度和文化上存在明显差异
socialStructure.en: Society was divided among the royal house and high nobility, clergy, landed knights and lairds, burgh burgesses, tenants and peasants, as well as clan chiefs and dependents in Highland society; the Lowlands and Highlands differed markedly in institutions and culture

rulingClass.zh: 国王、斯图亚特王朝王室、伯爵与领主、主教与大修道院长，以及在枢密院和议会中服务的低地地主精英
rulingClass.en: The king, the Stewart royal house, earls and lords, bishops and major abbots, and the Lowland landed elite serving in council and parliament

succession.zh: 世袭君主制，通常遵循长子继承原则，但受贵族支持、婚姻联盟与未成年继位风险影响较大
succession.en: Hereditary monarchy, generally following primogeniture, though heavily shaped by noble support, marriage alliances, and the risks of minority successions

structure.zh: 中央政府由国王主持，枢密院处理日常政务，议会批准重要立法与税赋，财政、司法、王室文书与王家领地管理分别由专门官员承担；地方上依靠郡司法长官、王室保安官、教会法庭、自治市与边区监护官维持秩序
structure.en: The central government was headed by the king, with the privy council handling routine administration, parliament approving major legislation and taxation, and specialized officers overseeing finance, justice, royal chancery, and crown lands; locally the kingdom relied on sheriffs, royal justiciars, ecclesiastical courts, burghs, and wardens of the marches

function.zh: 协助国王处理行政、司法、外交、边区治安与重要王令执行
function.en: Assisted the king in administration, justice, diplomacy, border security, and enforcement of major royal commands

function.zh: 管理王室收入、地租、关税、封建义务与账目审计
function.en: Managed royal income, rents, customs, feudal dues, and auditing of accounts

function.zh: 起草和发布特许状、敕令、土地授予与正式文书
function.en: Drafted and issued charters, writs, land grants, and formal instruments

function.zh: 通过司法长官、保安官和中央法庭处理刑事、土地与王权案件
function.en: Handled criminal, land, and crown cases through justiciars, sheriffs, and central courts

function.zh: 管理王家地产、皇家城堡、仓储补给与边防据点
function.en: Administered crown estates, royal castles, stored provisions, and frontier strongholds

function.zh: 负责英苏边境的防务、巡逻、谈判与边民纠纷处理
function.en: Oversaw defense, patrols, negotiation, and dispute settlement along the Anglo-Scottish border

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以郡和保安官辖区为主，低地由地主、郡官与自治市议会治理，高地与群岛则更多依赖氏族领袖、地方领主和半自治传统；王权对偏远地区的控制强弱不一
localAdmin.en: Local administration centered on shires and sheriffdoms: the Lowlands were governed through lairds, county officers, and burgh councils, while the Highlands and Isles relied more on clan chiefs, regional lords, and semi-autonomous custom; royal control varied greatly in remote districts

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系结合习惯法、封建法、教会法与日益受欧洲大陆影响的罗马法传统；中央法庭、教会法庭与地方保安官法庭并存
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined customary law, feudal law, canon law, and a growing influence from continental Roman law traditions; central courts, church courts, and local sheriff courts coexisted

taxationSystem.zh: 财政主要依赖王室领地收入、关税、司法罚金、封建贡赋和议会批准的特别税；日常直接征税能力有限，王权在征收上仍需依赖地方精英合作
taxationSystem.en: Revenue relied chiefly on crown lands, customs duties, judicial fines, feudal dues, and extraordinary taxation approved by parliament; routine direct taxation remained limited, and the monarchy still depended on cooperation from local elites

religion.zh: 罗马天主教为国教，主教区、修道院、圣徒崇拜与教会节日构成公共生活核心，但晚期中世纪已有对教会财政和纪律的批评声音
religion.en: Roman Catholicism was the established religion, with dioceses, monasteries, saintly cults, and church festivals forming the core of public life, though late medieval criticism of clerical wealth and discipline was already present

philosophy.zh: 思想上以经院神学、王权合法性、基督教道德秩序与文艺复兴人文主义早期影响并存；王室宫廷与圣安德鲁斯等学术中心开始接触欧洲大陆新学风
philosophy.en: Intellectual life combined scholastic theology, theories of royal legitimacy, Christian moral order, and early Renaissance humanist influence; the royal court and centers such as St Andrews increasingly engaged with new continental learning

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用拉丁字母；正式教会和法律文书常用拉丁文，宫廷与低地行政广泛使用中古苏格兰语，盖尔语在高地和群岛主要以口传文化为主，也有少量书写传统
writingSystem.en: The Latin alphabet was used throughout; formal ecclesiastical and legal texts often employed Latin, the court and Lowland administration widely used Middle Scots, and Gaelic in the Highlands and Isles remained predominantly oral though not entirely unwritten

culturalAchievements.zh: 詹姆斯四世宫廷以音乐、诗歌、纹章艺术和造船闻名；自治市手工业、教堂建筑、彩绘祭坛、编年史写作与高地盖尔口头诗歌传统都较为活跃，国王本人也支持学术与外科医学发展
culturalAchievements.en: The court of James IV was noted for music, poetry, heraldic culture, and shipbuilding; burgh crafts, church architecture, painted altars, chronicle writing, and Highland Gaelic oral poetry were all active, and the king himself patronized learning and surgery

languageFamily.zh: 主体语言属于日耳曼语族的中古苏格兰语，同时高地和群岛广泛使用凯尔特语族的苏格兰盖尔语；拉丁文是教会与学术共同语
languageFamily.en: The principal language was Middle Scots of the Germanic family, while Scottish Gaelic of the Celtic family was widely spoken in the Highlands and Isles; Latin served as the church and scholarly lingua franca

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以农业、畜牧业、羊毛、皮革、渔业和地方手工业为基础，整体规模中等，货币化程度在低地较高，在高地较低。对外贸易集中于羊毛、兽皮、鲑鱼、盐鱼与少量煤炭，依赖法国、低地国家和波罗的海贸易网络
gdpDescription.en: The economy rested on agriculture, pastoralism, wool, hides, fisheries, and local crafts, with a medium overall scale, greater monetization in the Lowlands, and less in the Highlands. Foreign trade focused on wool, hides, salmon, salted fish, and some coal, relying on networks linked to France, the Low Countries, and the Baltic

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物种植、牧羊与养牛、羊毛与皮革加工、渔业、酿酒、盐业、采煤、木材加工、造船与城市手工业
mainIndustries.en: Grain cultivation, sheep and cattle raising, wool and leather processing, fishing, brewing, salt production, coal mining, timber working, shipbuilding, and urban crafts

tradeGoods.zh: 出口羊毛、兽皮、鲑鱼、鳕鱼、盐鱼、煤炭与粗布；进口葡萄酒、奢侈布料、香料、金属制品、书籍、武器和部分谷物
tradeGoods.en: Exports included wool, hides, salmon, cod, salted fish, coal, and coarse cloth; imports included wine, luxury textiles, spices, metalware, books, weapons, and some grain

householdWealth.zh: 大多数家庭财富有限，以土地使用权、牲畜、谷物存量和简单器具为主；低地自治市商人和部分地主家庭积累了较明显的货币与不动产财富，王国贫富差距显著
householdWealth.en: Most households possessed limited wealth, mainly in land-use rights, livestock, grain stocks, and simple tools; Lowland burgh merchants and some landed families accumulated more visible monetary and real-estate wealth, and inequality within the kingdom was marked

economicSystem.zh: 以封建土地关系和自治市商业特权为基础的混合经济，低地市场交换较发达，高地则更依赖氏族、贡赋与实物经济；王室通过港口关税和特许状促进贸易
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy based on feudal land relations and burgh commercial privileges, with more developed market exchange in the Lowlands and greater dependence on clan structures, tribute, and barter in the Highlands; the crown promoted trade through port customs and charters

source.zh: 议会批准税与特别征收

treasuryDescription.zh: 在詹姆斯四世统治下，王室财政较前代稳健，能够维持宫廷、舰船建造和有限军事准备，但财政基础仍然狭窄，遇到长期战争时极易承压
treasuryDescription.en: Under James IV the royal finances were steadier than under earlier reigns, sufficient to sustain the court, shipbuilding, and limited military preparedness, though the fiscal base remained narrow and would come under strain in prolonged war

fiscalPolicy.zh: 政策目标是扩大王室直接收入、强化关税征收、利用司法与特许状获利，并在不激怒贵族与自治市的前提下维持财政稳定
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy aimed to enlarge direct royal income, strengthen customs collection, profit from justice and chartering, and preserve stability without provoking the nobility and burghs

description.zh: 王国主力由低地封建征召兵和自治市民兵构成，近年来受欧洲大陆影响，愈发重视长枪密集阵与纪律
description.en: The main strength of the kingdom consisted of Lowland feudal levies and burgh militia, increasingly emphasizing disciplined pike formations under continental influence

description.zh: 由贵族及其扈从组成，数量不多，但在侦察、突击与王室威望展示方面重要
description.en: Composed of nobles and their retainers, not numerous but important for reconnaissance, shock action, and displays of royal prestige

description.zh: 活跃于英苏边境，擅长袭扰、追击和地方防御，具有明显边区战斗传统
description.en: Active along the Anglo-Scottish frontier, they specialized in raiding, pursuit, and local defense and drew on a strong march fighting tradition

description.zh: 王室拥有一定数量火炮与炮手，主要用于攻城和城堡防御，詹姆斯四世对火器和铸炮较为重视
description.en: The crown maintained a modest artillery arm and trained gunners, chiefly for sieges and castle defense, and James IV took notable interest in ordnance and cannon founding

description.zh: 海军规模虽小但在同时代苏格兰较为先进，拥有如“大米迦勒号”一类大型战船的建造能力，用于海上威望、护航与沿岸防务
description.en: Though small, the navy was advanced by Scottish standards of the age, with the capacity to build large warships such as the Great Michael, serving maritime prestige, convoying, and coastal defense

commanderInChief.zh: 詹姆斯四世，苏格兰国王
commanderInChief.en: James IV, King of Scots

technology.zh: 军队处于中世纪晚期向文艺复兴早期过渡阶段，结合长枪方阵、传统冷兵器、少量火绳枪和较成熟的攻城炮；海军造船技术在不列颠北部较突出
technology.en: The military stood in a transition from the late medieval to early Renaissance style, combining pike formations, traditional edged weapons, a small number of handguns, and more developed siege artillery; naval shipbuilding was notable in northern Britain

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自英格兰边境冲突、边区劫掠、岛屿与高地局部不稳，以及一旦履行法苏同盟义务时可能卷入对英战争
threats.en: The main threats came from conflict on the English border, frontier raiding, localized instability in the Isles and Highlands, and the possibility of being drawn into war with England through obligations under the Auld Alliance with France

populationDescription.zh: 1500年前后苏格兰人口大约为50万，主要集中在低地农业区、东海岸城镇和若干教会中心；高地和群岛人口较分散，社会组织更依赖氏族与地方领主
populationDescription.en: Around 1500 Scotland's population was roughly 500,000, concentrated in the Lowland farming districts, east-coast towns, and a few ecclesiastical centers; the Highlands and Isles were more sparsely settled and organized more through clans and local lordship

socialClasses.zh: 上层为王室、大贵族和高级教士；中层为地主、骑士、自治市商人、行会师傅和下级教士；下层为佃农、小农、工匠学徒、雇工与边区或高地附庸人口。高地氏族身份与低地封建身份并行存在
socialClasses.en: The upper strata consisted of the royal house, great nobles, and senior clergy; the middle ranks included lairds, knights, burgh merchants, guild masters, and lower clergy; the lower orders were tenants, smallholders, craft apprentices, laborers, and dependent populations in the borderlands or Highlands. Highland clan identity coexisted with Lowland feudal status

allies.zh: 法国是最重要盟友，传统的“法苏同盟”仍是苏格兰对外政策核心；同时与教廷及低地国家保持实用联系
allies.en: France was the principal ally, and the traditional Auld Alliance remained central to Scottish foreign policy; the kingdom also maintained pragmatic ties with the papacy and the Low Countries

enemies.zh: 主要对手是英格兰王国，尽管1500年时并非全面战争状态，但边境紧张、战略互疑和历史敌意长期存在
enemies.en: The principal rival was the Kingdom of England; although not in full-scale war in 1500, border tension, strategic mistrust, and historical hostility persisted

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以维持对英平衡、巩固法苏同盟、提升王室在欧洲宫廷中的地位，并通过婚姻、使节与贸易维护国家安全和王朝利益为主
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on preserving a balance against England, sustaining the Auld Alliance with France, elevating the crown's standing among European courts, and using marriage, diplomacy, and trade to protect the kingdom and dynasty

era.zh: 文艺复兴时期

keyInnovations.zh: 火药武器和攻城炮逐渐普及，王室造船技术发展显著，导航、铸炮、城堡防御改造和大学教育有所进步；不过整体技术水平仍落后于意大利和部分西欧核心地区
keyInnovations.en: Gunpowder weapons and siege artillery were spreading, royal shipbuilding advanced notably, and navigation, cannon founding, castle adaptation, and university learning improved; however, overall technological development still lagged behind Italy and some core regions of western Europe

strengths.zh: 詹姆斯四世统治下政治相对稳定，王权增强，宫廷活跃，海军和炮兵建设有进展；法苏同盟为其提供重要外交支点，低地经济与自治市贸易具备一定活力
strengths.en: Under James IV the kingdom enjoyed relative political stability, stronger monarchy, an active court, and advances in naval and artillery development; the Auld Alliance provided an important diplomatic anchor, while the Lowland economy and burgh trade showed real vitality

weaknesses.zh: 人口与财政规模偏小，国家整合程度有限，高地和群岛控制力不足，对贵族合作依赖很深；若与英格兰爆发长期大战，资源和人力都难以持续支撑
weaknesses.en: Population and fiscal resources were modest, national integration remained incomplete, control over the Highlands and Isles was uneven, and the crown depended heavily on noble cooperation; in a prolonged war with England, resources and manpower would be difficult to sustain

outlook.zh: 1500年的苏格兰前景总体稳定而谨慎乐观，只要避免与英格兰进行破坏性正面战争，王权、贸易和文艺复兴式宫廷文化都有继续发展的空间；但其战略处境依旧脆弱，任何对英冒险都可能逆转局势
outlook.en: In 1500 Scotland's outlook was broadly stable and cautiously optimistic: if it avoided a destructive direct war with England, royal authority, trade, and Renaissance court culture all had room to develop further; yet its strategic position remained fragile, and any reckless confrontation with England could reverse these gains

description.zh: 苏格兰在詹姆斯四世统治下相对稳固，并维持与法国的传统同盟。
description.en: Scotland was relatively secure under James IV and maintained its traditional alliance with France.

name.zh: 西班牙天主教君主联合王权
伊比利亚文明（西班牙王国）

ruler.zh: 斐迪南二世与伊莎贝拉一世

governmentForm.zh: 复合型君主制，由卡斯蒂利亚与阿拉贡在共同王室下联合，保留各自法制、议会与行政传统
governmentForm.en: Composite monarchy uniting Castile and Aragon under a مشترک crown while preserving distinct laws, assemblies, and administrative traditions

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王室、贵族、教士、城市市民、手工业者、农民与少数改宗群体构成；各地区保留强烈地方身份，卡斯蒂利亚与阿拉贡诸领地差异显著
socialStructure.en: Society was structured around the crown, nobility, clergy, urban burghers, artisans, peasants, and minority convert communities; strong regional identities persisted, with notable differences between the Castilian and Aragonese realms

rulingClass.zh: 王室、高级贵族、大主教与主教、军事修会领袖、王室法学官僚与主要城市寡头
rulingClass.en: The crown, high nobility, archbishops and bishops, leaders of military orders, royal legal bureaucrats, and oligarchies of major towns

succession.zh: 按各王国习惯实行世袭继承；卡斯蒂利亚允许女性继承，王位通过特拉斯塔马拉家族合法传承
succession.en: Hereditary succession according to the customs of each constituent kingdom; Castile permitted female succession, and the throne passed legitimately through the Trastámara line

structure.zh: 中央权力围绕君主及其御前会议运作；卡斯蒂利亚有较强的王室行政体系，阿拉贡诸邦则通过各自议会、法权与总督体系治理。重要机构包括国家会议、财政机构、王室司法机关、宗教裁判所及地方市镇行政网络
structure.en: Central authority operated through the monarchs and their royal councils; Castile possessed a comparatively stronger royal administration, while the Crowns of Aragon were governed through their own cortes, legal privileges, and viceroyal structures. Key institutions included the Council of State, fiscal offices, royal courts, the Inquisition, and municipal administrative networks

function.zh: 处理立法建议、司法申诉、官员任命与王室政策协调，尤其在卡斯蒂利亚发挥核心作用
function.en: Handled legislative advice, judicial appeals, official appointments, and coordination of royal policy, especially in Castile

function.zh: 征收常税与非常税，管理王室收入、租税承包、铸币与债务支付
function.en: Collected ordinary and extraordinary taxes and managed royal income, tax farming, minting, and debt payments

function.zh: 负责高等司法审判、上诉与敕令执行，维护王权法秩序
function.en: Oversaw superior justice, appeals, and enforcement of royal decrees, upholding the legal order of the crown

function.zh: 监督宗教正统、审查改宗者与异端案件，并服务于王室统一政策
function.en: Supervised religious orthodoxy, investigated converts and heresy cases, and served the monarchy’s policies of confessional unity

name.zh: 军事修会与边防管理机构

function.zh: 管理原格拉纳达边地、防御据点、骑士领地与部分军务资源
function.en: Managed the former Granada frontier, defensive strongholds, knightly lordships, and portions of military resources

function.zh: 通过 corregidores 等王室代表监督城市议会、治安、征税与公共秩序
function.en: Used royal representatives such as corregidores to supervise town councils, policing, taxation, and public order

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依托城市议会、王室派驻督政官、领主辖区及教会司法共同运行。卡斯蒂利亚的 corregidor 制度强化王权对城市的控制；阿拉贡、加泰罗尼亚与瓦伦西亚则保留更强的地方特权与法制传统
localAdmin.en: Local administration functioned through town councils, royal governors, lordly jurisdictions, and ecclesiastical courts. In Castile, the corregidor system strengthened royal oversight over towns; Aragon, Catalonia, and Valencia retained stronger local privileges and legal traditions

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系多元并存，包括卡斯蒂利亚法、阿拉贡法、城市特权法、罗马法与教会法。王室法院不断扩大权威，但各领地法权差异依然明显
legalSystem.en: The legal system was plural, combining Castilian law, Aragonese law, municipal fueros, Roman law, and canon law. Royal courts steadily expanded authority, but major legal differences between the realms remained

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以卡斯蒂利亚销售税 alcabala、服务税 servicios、关税、羊毛出口税、教会让渡收入及临时补助为主。阿拉贡诸邦征税须更多依赖议会同意，税制较分散
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied chiefly on the Castilian alcabala sales tax, servicios grants, customs duties, wool export dues, transferred ecclesiastical revenues, and extraordinary levies. In the Aragonese realms taxation depended more heavily on consent from representative assemblies and was more fragmented

religion.zh: 罗马天主教为国家核心信仰，王权强调宗教统一；1492年后犹太人被驱逐，穆斯林人口在新征服地区受到持续压力
religion.en: Roman Catholicism was the core state faith, and the monarchy emphasized religious unity; after 1492 Jews were expelled, while Muslim populations in newly conquered territories faced increasing pressure

philosophy.zh: 思想上融合经院哲学、晚期中世纪法学、人文主义与王权神授观念；大学和教会仍具主导地位，但意大利式文艺复兴人文主义正逐渐传播
philosophy.en: Intellectual life blended scholasticism, late medieval jurisprudence, humanism, and notions of divinely sanctioned monarchy; universities and the Church remained dominant, while Italian Renaissance humanism spread gradually

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用拉丁字母；行政与文学中以卡斯蒂利亚语、加泰罗尼亚语、阿拉贡语及拉丁语为主
writingSystem.en: The Latin alphabet was used throughout; Castilian, Catalan, Aragonese, and Latin predominated in administration and literature

culturalAchievements.zh: 完成格拉纳达征服后，王国形成强烈的天主教君权文化；塞维利亚、托莱多与萨拉曼卡成为学术与宗教中心。建筑上延续晚期哥特、穆德哈尔与早期文艺复兴风格；航海知识、地图绘制与编年史写作迅速发展
culturalAchievements.en: After the conquest of Granada, the monarchy fostered a powerful Catholic royal culture; Seville, Toledo, and Salamanca became important centers of learning and religion. Architecture combined late Gothic, Mudéjar, and early Renaissance forms; navigational knowledge, cartography, and chronicle writing advanced rapidly

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属罗曼语族伊比利亚分支，另有巴斯克语等非印欧语言区域存在
languageFamily.en: The principal languages belonged to the Iberian branch of the Romance family, alongside non-Indo-European enclaves such as Basque

gdpDescription.zh: 经济在西欧属强盛水平，卡斯蒂利亚的人口、农业与羊毛出口构成主体，阿拉贡诸地则依赖地中海商业、手工业和区域金融。1492年后格拉纳达并入与大西洋航线开拓增强了增长预期
gdpDescription.en: The economy stood among the stronger ones in Western Europe, with Castile’s population, agriculture, and wool exports forming the core, while the Aragonese lands relied on Mediterranean commerce, crafts, and regional finance. The incorporation of Granada and the opening of Atlantic routes after 1492 improved prospects for growth

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物农业、牧羊业、羊毛生产与出口、葡萄酒、橄榄油、纺织、制革、金属加工、造船、地中海与大西洋贸易
mainIndustries.en: Cereal agriculture, sheep raising, wool production and export, wine, olive oil, textiles, leatherworking, metalworking, shipbuilding, and Mediterranean and Atlantic trade

tradeGoods.zh: 细羊毛、布匹、皮革、铁器、染料、橄榄油、葡萄酒、小麦、糖、奴隶、香料转口品与早期大西洋殖民产物
tradeGoods.en: Fine wool, cloth, leather, iron goods, dyes, olive oil, wine, wheat, sugar, slaves, re-exported spices, and early Atlantic colonial products

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异很大。城市寡头、贵族与教会机构拥有大量地产、税租与羊群；普通农民和手工业者多仅维持中低水平财产，部分地区仍承受地租、什一税与市政摊派压力
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. Urban oligarchs, nobles, and ecclesiastical institutions held substantial land, rents, and flocks; ordinary peasants and artisans generally maintained modest property and in many areas faced rents, tithes, and municipal burdens

unit.en: maravedís per year (post-1492 accounting value) annually

economicSystem.zh: 以农业地租、城市市场、行会生产、跨区域羊毛贸易和王室特许权相结合的前近代混合经济；国家干预有限但在税收、港口监管、贸易许可和殖民授予方面作用增强
economicSystem.en: A premodern mixed economy combining agrarian rents, urban markets, guild production, interregional wool trade, and royal privileges; state intervention was limited but growing in taxation, port regulation, trade licensing, and colonial grants

source.en: Sales taxes and urban indirect taxation

source.zh: 议会批准补助与特别税
教会让渡收入与十字军税
source.en: Transferred ecclesiastical revenues and crusading taxes

source.zh: 王室领地、司法罚金与特许收入
source.en: Royal domain, judicial fines, and privileged revenues

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况相对稳健，但并不宽裕。长期战争、宫廷支出与海外投资要求持续筹资，王室越来越依赖税收预支、信贷与特许收入
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was relatively sound but not abundant. Long wars, court expenses, and overseas ventures required continued fundraising, and the monarchy increasingly depended on tax advances, credit, and privileged revenues

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策倾向于加强王室征收能力、整顿税契、扩大常税基础并利用宗教与战争名义争取额外拨款；同时谨慎维持信用，以支持王朝扩张
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy aimed to strengthen royal collection capacity, regularize tax contracts, broaden ordinary revenue, and secure additional grants under religious and military justifications; at the same time the crown sought to preserve creditworthiness to support dynastic expansion

description.zh: 由长矛兵、剑盾兵、弩手及日益增多的火绳枪手构成，是格拉纳达战争后经验最丰富的主力
description.en: Composed of pikemen, sword-and-buckler men, crossbowmen, and a growing number of arquebusiers; it was the most experienced arm after the Granada campaigns

description.zh: 包括贵族重骑兵、轻骑兵与边地骑士部队，适合侦察、突击与追击
description.en: Included noble heavy cavalry, light cavalry, and frontier-mounted forces suited for reconnaissance, shock action, and pursuit

description.zh: 围城炮兵在15世纪后期显著发展，用于攻城、城防和火器维护
description.en: Siege artillery had expanded significantly in the late fifteenth century and was used in sieges, fortress defense, and firearms maintenance

description.zh: 由王室舰船、征调商船与地中海桨帆战船组成，承担海岸防御、对北非行动与大西洋远航护送
description.en: Consisted of royal vessels, requisitioned merchant shipping, and Mediterranean galleys, serving coastal defense, operations against North Africa, and Atlantic escort duties

description.zh: 由城市、边境地区与领主辖地动员，用于守备、补充与地方治安
description.en: Mobilized from towns, frontier zones, and lordly territories for garrison duty, reinforcement, and local security

commanderInChief.zh: 斐迪南二世为主要统帅，伊莎贝拉一世共同主持战争决策
commanderInChief.en: Ferdinand II served as principal field commander, while Isabella I jointly directed major war policy

technology.zh: 军队正处于中世纪晚期向近代早期过渡阶段，广泛使用火炮、弩与早期火绳枪；攻城战、野战纪律和步骑协同能力在欧洲处于先进水平
technology.en: The military was in transition from late medieval to early modern forms, employing artillery, crossbows, and early arquebuses on a broad scale; siegecraft, battlefield discipline, and infantry-cavalry coordination were advanced by European standards

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自法国在意大利与比利牛斯方向的竞争、北非穆斯林海盗与诸港口势力、奥斯曼海上扩张，以及国内新并入地区的宗教与社会不稳
threats.en: Major threats came from French rivalry in Italy and around the Pyrenees, Muslim corsair and port powers in North Africa, Ottoman maritime expansion, and religious and social instability in newly incorporated territories

populationDescription.zh: 人口总量在欧洲属大型王国，主体集中于卡斯蒂利亚。1492年后格拉纳达并入扩大了统治人口，但犹太人被驱逐、改宗政策与地区差异对人口结构产生明显影响
populationDescription.en: Its total population made it one of the larger kingdoms in Europe, with the majority concentrated in Castile. The annexation of Granada after 1492 enlarged the ruled population, while the expulsion of Jews, conversion policies, and regional differences significantly affected demographic composition

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层包括王室、世俗贵族、教士、城市寡头、商人、行会匠人、自由农民、佃农、劳役农民、改宗者以及受怀疑和监管的穆德哈尔与摩里斯科群体
socialClasses.en: Social strata included the crown, secular nobility, clergy, urban oligarchs, merchants, guild artisans, free peasants, tenant farmers, laboring peasants, converts, and Mudéjar and Morisco communities subject to suspicion and supervision

allies.zh: 与葡萄牙保持既竞争又协商的关系，并通过婚姻与哈布斯堡王朝建立联系；与教廷保持密切合作，在意大利事务中寻求反法伙伴
allies.en: It maintained a relationship of both rivalry and negotiation with Portugal, forged ties with the Habsburgs through marriage, and cooperated closely with the papacy while seeking anti-French partners in Italian affairs

enemies.zh: 主要对手是法国王国；在地中海与北非方向则面对格拉纳达残余势力之外的穆斯林港口政权、巴巴里海盗网络及更广泛的奥斯曼势力影响
enemies.en: Its principal rival was the Kingdom of France; in the Mediterranean and North African sphere it also faced Muslim port polities, Barbary corsair networks, and the wider influence of Ottoman power

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以王朝联姻、遏制法国、控制伊比利亚、向意大利扩张影响、保障地中海安全并发展大西洋航线与海外据点为核心
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on dynastic marriage, containing France, dominating Iberia, extending influence into Italy, securing the Mediterranean, and developing Atlantic routes and overseas footholds

era.zh: 文艺复兴时代

keyInnovations.zh: 改进型火炮与火绳枪运用、远洋航海技术、地图绘制、天文导航、海船设计、堡垒工程与官僚文书制度均取得显著进步，尤其在远洋航行组织方面迅速追赶并接近葡萄牙水平
keyInnovations.en: Important advances appeared in the use of improved artillery and arquebuses, oceanic navigation, cartography, astronomical piloting, ship design, fortification engineering, and bureaucratic record keeping, especially in the organization of long-distance voyages where Spain was rapidly catching up to Portugal

navigationAndExploration.zh: 航海与探险技术前沿：哥伦布1492年发现新大陆，西班牙成为大航海时代的两大先锋之一。航海技术（星盘、十字杆、卡拉克帆船）和地图制图学快速发展。麦哲伦即将于1519年启程环球航行。
navigationAndExploration.en: Frontier navigation and exploration: Columbus's 1492 discovery of the New World makes Spain one of the two pioneers of the Age of Discovery. Navigation technology (astrolabe, cross-staff, carrack ships) and cartography advance rapidly. Magellan will depart for circumnavigation in 1519.

militaryTechnology.zh: 军事技术欧洲前列：西班牙方阵（tercio）是16世纪初欧洲最强陆军战术体系。火绳枪与长矛兵配合的战术创新领先。格拉纳达攻城战（1492年）展示了先进的攻城技术。
militaryTechnology.en: European military technology leader: the Spanish tercio is early 16th century Europe's most powerful army tactical system. Tactical innovation combining arquebusiers and pikemen leads. The siege of Granada (1492) demonstrated advanced siege technology.

overallAssessment.zh: 1500年的西班牙凭借航海探险和军事技术正在开创一个全球帝国。哥伦布发现新大陆和即将到来的征服美洲将改变世界格局。但西班牙的科技优势主要集中在军事和航海领域，在制造业和科学研究方面落后于意大利城邦和即将崛起的北欧。新大陆的金银流入将在短期内带来巨大财富，但长期将导致'荷兰病'式的制造业衰退。
overallAssessment.en: Spain in 1500 is creating a global empire through naval exploration and military technology. Columbus's discovery and the coming conquest of the Americas will reshape the world order. But Spain's tech advantage concentrates on military and navigation; it lags Italian city-states and the rising northern Europeans in manufacturing and scientific research. New World gold and silver will bring enormous short-term wealth but long-term 'Dutch Disease' manufacturing decline.

strengths.zh: 王权集中度提升、宗教动员能力强、人口与资源基础雄厚、军队在围城与火器运用上表现突出，并已开启跨大西洋扩张，使其具备成为欧洲强权的条件
strengths.en: Increasing royal centralization, strong capacity for religious mobilization, a substantial demographic and resource base, and a military notable for siegecraft and firearms gave it the foundations of a major European power, while transatlantic expansion had already begun

weaknesses.zh: 王国仍是法律与制度不完全统一的复合体，财政常受战争拖累；社会对宗教一致性的强制追求损害部分商业与技术群体，地区差异与债务压力长期存在
weaknesses.en: The monarchy remained an incompletely unified composite state with varied legal and institutional systems, and its finances were regularly strained by war; coercive pursuit of religious uniformity harmed some commercial and technical communities, while regional divisions and debt burdens persisted

outlook.zh: 1500年前后的西班牙正处于上升拐点。若能维持财政信用、巩固国内整合并有效管理海外扩张，未来数十年极可能跃升为横跨欧洲与大西洋世界的主导性君主国
outlook.en: Around 1500 Spain stood at a point of ascent. If it could preserve fiscal credit, consolidate domestic integration, and manage overseas expansion effectively, it was highly likely within decades to emerge as a dominant monarchy spanning Europe and the Atlantic world

description.zh: 卡斯蒂利亚与阿拉贡联合后的西班牙正迅速扩张，并开启大西洋帝国建设。
description.en: United under the Catholic Monarchs, Spain was expanding rapidly and beginning its Atlantic imperial project.

leaderTitle.zh: 阿拉贡国王·卡斯蒂利亚摄政
leaderTitle.en: King of Aragon and Regent of Castile

ideology.zh: 王权集中、天主教统一与海外殖民扩张
ideology.en: Royal centralization, Catholic unity, and overseas colonial expansion

relationship.zh: 费迪南与伊莎贝拉的联姻（1469）创造了西班牙统一的基础。1504年伊莎贝拉去世后，费迪南以卡斯蒂利亚摄政的身份继续统治，同时巩固西班牙在新世界和地中海的扩张。天主教双王建立了宗教裁判所、完成了收复失地运动、资助了哥伦布的航行，开创了西班牙的黄金时代。
relationship.en: The marriage of Ferdinand and Isabella (1469) created the foundation for Spanish unification. After Isabella's death in 1504, Ferdinand continued to rule as regent of Castile while consolidating Spain's expansion in the New World and Mediterranean. The Catholic Monarchs established the Inquisition, completed the Reconquista, funded Columbus's voyages, and inaugurated Spain's Golden Age.

description.zh: 费迪南二世（1452-1516）和伊莎贝拉一世（1451-1504）是西班牙历史上最重要的君主对。他们通过联姻将卡斯蒂利亚和阿拉贡两个王国联合起来，奠定了统一西班牙的基础。1492年他们完成了光复运动的最后一步——攻陷格拉纳达，结束了伊比利亚半岛近八百年的穆斯林统治。同年，他们资助哥伦布横渡大西洋，开启了西班牙殖民帝国的建设。他们建立的宗教裁判所成为强制推行宗教统一的工具——1492年驱逐犹太人、后又迫害摩尔人。伊莎贝拉于1504年去世后，费迪南继续以摄政身份掌权，并在1500年前后的意大利战争中与法国争夺那不勒斯。费迪南被马基雅维利视为理想君主的范例，以其精明的外交手腕和无情的政治计算著称。
description.en: Ferdinand II (1452–1516) and Isabella I (1451–1504) were the most important royal couple in Spanish history. Through their marriage they united the kingdoms of Castile and Aragon, laying the foundation for a unified Spain. In 1492 they completed the final step of the Reconquista—the fall of Granada—ending nearly eight centuries of Muslim rule on the Iberian Peninsula. That same year, they funded Columbus's transatlantic voyage, launching Spain's colonial empire. Their Inquisition became an instrument for enforcing religious uniformity—expelling Jews in 1492 and later persecuting Moors. After Isabella's death in 1504, Ferdinand continued to rule as regent and competed with France for Naples in the Italian Wars. Ferdinand was regarded by Machiavelli as a model prince, renowned for shrewd diplomacy and ruthless political calculation.

role.zh: 天主教双王之一，西班牙统一与扩张的主导者
role.en: One of the Catholic Monarchs, architect of Spanish unification and expansion

role.zh: 1504年去世，其遗产奠定了西班牙帝国基础
role.en: Died 1504, her legacy laid the foundation of the Spanish Empire

role.zh: 西班牙最杰出的军事指挥官，征服意大利南部
role.en: Spain's greatest military commander, conquered southern Italy

ideology.zh: 封建特权、贵族自治与反集权
ideology.en: Feudal privileges, aristocratic autonomy, and anti-centralization

relationship.zh: 卡斯蒂利亚大贵族是西班牙传统权力结构的支柱，但天主教双王的集权政策严重侵蚀了他们的政治自主权。伊莎贝拉通过设立皇家评议会、收回领地特许权、控制骑士团团长职位等手段削弱了贵族权力。大贵族虽然不满，但因收复失地运动和海外殖民带来的新利益而暂时妥协。
relationship.en: The Castilian grandees were pillars of Spain's traditional power structure, but the Catholic Monarchs' centralization policies seriously eroded their political autonomy. Isabella weakened noble power through establishing the Royal Council, revoking territorial franchises, and controlling the masterships of military orders. Though resentful, the grandees temporarily acquiesced because of new opportunities from the Reconquista and overseas colonization.

description.zh: 卡斯蒂利亚大贵族（Grandeza）是西班牙最高等级的世袭贵族，包括门多萨、恩里克斯、阿尔瓦、贝纳文特等显赫家族。在天主教双王之前的混乱时期（特别是恩里克四世统治期间），大贵族享有近乎独立的领地权力，控制着大片土地和私人武装。伊莎贝拉即位后系统性地削弱了贵族特权：她收回了被贵族侵占的王室领地，将三大骑士团（圣地亚哥、卡拉特拉瓦、阿尔坎塔拉）的团长职位归并王室，设立了直接听命于王室的巡回法官制度，并在各城市建立皇家代表。然而贵族仍然控制着卡斯蒂利亚大部分农业土地，在军事和社会地位上依然举足轻重。他们对费迪南在伊莎贝拉死后的摄政地位心存疑虑，部分贵族倾向于支持伊莎贝拉的女婿——哈布斯堡的腓力（美男子）的继承权。
description.en: The Castilian grandees (Grandeza) were Spain's highest hereditary nobility, including illustrious houses like the Mendoza, Enríquez, Alba, and Benavente. During the chaotic pre-Catholic Monarchs period (especially under Henry IV), grandees enjoyed near-independent territorial power, controlling vast lands and private armies. After Isabella's accession, she systematically weakened noble privileges: she reclaimed crown lands usurped by nobles, merged the masterships of the three great military orders (Santiago, Calatrava, Alcántara) into the crown, established a system of itinerant royal judges, and placed royal representatives in cities. Yet the nobility still controlled most of Castile's agricultural land and remained crucial in military and social standing. They harbored doubts about Ferdinand's regency after Isabella's death, with some nobles favoring the succession claims of Isabella's son-in-law, Philip the Handsome of Habsburg.

role.zh: 卡斯蒂利亚最富有的贵族家族之一
role.en: One of Castile's wealthiest noble families

role.zh: 世袭海军统帅家族，费迪南的外祖父家族
role.en: Hereditary naval command family, Ferdinand's maternal grandfather's house

leader.zh: 弗朗西斯科·希梅内斯·德·西斯内罗斯

leaderTitle.zh: 托莱多大主教·卡斯蒂利亚首席主教
leaderTitle.en: Archbishop of Toledo and Primate of Castile

ideology.zh: 天主教正统、宗教统一与异端清除
ideology.en: Catholic orthodoxy, religious uniformity, and extirpation of heresy

relationship.zh: 教会与宗教裁判所是天主教双王政策的忠实执行者和意识形态支柱。西斯内罗斯大主教兼具宗教热忱和政治能力，他推行的宗教统一政策（包括强制改宗穆斯林）与王室利益高度一致。宗教裁判所不仅是宗教工具，更成为王室控制社会、压制异见的政治手段。
relationship.en: The Church and Inquisition were faithful executors and ideological pillars of the Catholic Monarchs' policies. Archbishop Cisneros combined religious zeal with political ability; his religious uniformity policies (including forced conversion of Muslims) aligned closely with royal interests. The Inquisition was not merely a religious tool but became a political instrument for royal social control and suppression of dissent.

description.zh: 西班牙宗教裁判所（成立于1478年）是天主教双王最具争议的遗产之一。它最初针对被怀疑秘密保持犹太教信仰的改宗者（conversos），后来扩展到摩尔人改宗者（moriscos）和各种异端。第一任大审判官托马斯·德·托尔克马达（任期1483-1498）以严酷著称，在其任期内数千人被处以火刑。1500年前后，弗朗西斯科·希梅内斯·德·西斯内罗斯已成为西班牙教会最有权势的人物。这位方济各会修士出身的大主教是一位复杂的人物：他一方面推行严格的修会改革和学术事业（创办阿尔卡拉大学、主持编纂多语种《圣经》），另一方面在格拉纳达强制推行穆斯林改宗，焚毁阿拉伯语书籍。宗教裁判所的存在确保了西班牙成为欧洲宗教最为划一的国家，但也造成了大量知识和文化损失，并驱逐了犹太人和穆斯林这两个在经济和学术上颇有贡献的群体。
description.en: The Spanish Inquisition (established 1478) was one of the Catholic Monarchs' most controversial legacies. Initially targeting conversos suspected of secretly practicing Judaism, it later expanded to Morisco converts and various heretics. The first Grand Inquisitor, Tomás de Torquemada (1483–1498), was notorious for severity, with thousands burned at the stake during his tenure. By around 1500, Francisco Ximénez de Cisneros had become the most powerful figure in the Spanish Church. This archbishop of Franciscan origins was a complex figure: he implemented strict monastic reforms and scholarly projects (founding the University of Alcalá, overseeing the Complutensian Polyglot Bible) while simultaneously forcing Muslim conversion in Granada and burning Arabic books. The Inquisition ensured Spain became Europe's most religiously uniform state but also caused immense intellectual and cultural loss, expelling Jews and Muslims—two groups that had contributed significantly to the economy and scholarship.

name.zh: 弗朗西斯科·希梅内斯·德·西斯内罗斯

role.zh: 西班牙教会领袖，兼具改革者和宗教强硬派双重角色
role.en: Leader of the Spanish Church, embodying both reformer and religious hardliner

role.zh: 继托尔克马达后的宗教裁判所领导者
role.en: Successor to Torquemada as leader of the Inquisition

governmentForm.zh: 米兰公国是由斯福尔扎家族控制的意大利文艺复兴世袭君主政体，名义上受神圣罗马帝国法理框架约束。
governmentForm.en: The Duchy of Milan was a hereditary Renaissance principality controlled by the House of Sforza, nominally operating within the legal framework of the Holy Roman Empire.

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构由宫廷贵族、城市显贵、行会手工业者、乡村佃农与雇农组成。米兰及周边城镇的商人、银行家与工匠在公共生活中占有重要地位，而乡村地区仍由地主、教会机构与地方司法网络深刻影响。
socialStructure.en: The social structure consisted of court nobility, urban patricians, guild artisans, and rural tenants and laborers. Merchants, bankers, and craftsmen of Milan and surrounding towns played an important role in public life, while the countryside remained strongly shaped by landlords, church institutions, and local judicial networks.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层以斯福尔扎宫廷、军功贵族、法学官僚和富裕城市家族为核心。公爵通过庇护网络、婚姻联盟和财政任命维系其统治。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class centered on the Sforza court, military nobles, legal-administrative officials, and wealthy urban families. The duke maintained rule through patronage networks, marriage alliances, and fiscal appointments.

succession.zh: 继承原则上为家族世袭，但在15世纪末的米兰，继承合法性常受帝国授权、意大利战争与外国干预影响。卢多维科·斯福尔扎本人即在复杂的摄政与篡夺背景中掌权。
succession.en: Succession was in principle hereditary, but in late fifteenth-century Milan legitimacy was heavily influenced by imperial recognition, the Italian Wars, and foreign intervention. Ludovico Sforza himself came to power through a complex context of regency and usurpation.

structure.zh: 公国政府以公爵宫廷为核心，结合书记官、财政官员和司法机构形成较成熟的城市国家行政体系。中央权力对核心城市和要塞控制较强，但对边缘领地与附属贵族仍需协商与驻军并用。
structure.en: The ducal government was centered on the court and supported by chanceries, fiscal officers, and judicial bodies, forming a relatively mature city-state administrative system. Central power was strong in the core cities and fortresses, but in peripheral lands and among subordinate nobles it still relied on negotiation backed by garrisons.

function.zh: 起草诏令、管理外交文书、保存档案并协调各级政务。
function.en: Drafted decrees, managed diplomatic correspondence, kept archives, and coordinated state business.

function.zh: 征收税赋、管理国库、监督关税与铸币。
function.en: Collected taxes, managed the treasury, supervised customs, and oversaw minting.

function.zh: 管理法庭、城市治安、刑罚执行与部分地方纠纷仲裁。
function.en: Administered courts, urban order, criminal punishments, and arbitration of some local disputes.

function.zh: 负责雇佣军合同、军械储备、边防要塞与驻军调度。
function.en: Handled mercenary contracts, armament stores, frontier fortresses, and garrison deployments.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依靠城市长官、司法官及乡村领地管理人运作。伦巴第核心城镇多保留一定市政传统，但关键职位通常受公爵任命或审查。
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through city governors, magistrates, and rural estate officials. Core Lombard towns retained some municipal traditions, but key positions were usually appointed or vetted by the duke.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系结合罗马法传统、城市成文法规与公爵敕令。教会法在婚姻、继承和宗教事务中仍有重要影响。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined Roman law traditions, municipal statutes, and ducal ordinances. Canon law remained important in marriage, inheritance, and religious matters.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收主要来自土地税、城市消费税、关税、盐税及特许垄断收入。战争时期常加征非常税并依赖借贷。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied mainly on land taxes, urban excises, customs, salt duties, and monopoly revenues. In wartime the duchy frequently imposed extraordinary levies and resorted to borrowing.

religion.zh: 天主教
religion.en: Roman Catholicism

culturalAchievements.zh: 米兰是文艺复兴艺术、建筑、军事工程与音乐的重要中心，斯福尔扎宫廷曾赞助达·芬奇等艺术家。其城堡、教堂和宫廷节庆展现出高度发达的物质文化与政治象征艺术。
culturalAchievements.en: Milan was a major center of Renaissance art, architecture, military engineering, and music, and the Sforza court patronized figures such as Leonardo da Vinci. Its castles, churches, and court festivals reflected highly developed material culture and political symbolism.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系—意大利语族—罗曼语支
languageFamily.en: Indo-European — Italic — Romance

philosophy.zh: 拉丁基督教人文主义与宫廷赞助文化
philosophy.en: Latin Christian humanism and court patronage culture

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母；行政与学术多用拉丁文，日常与文学亦广用意大利俗语和伦巴第方言
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet; Latin dominated administration and scholarship, while Italian vernacular and Lombard dialects were also widely used

unit.en: silver florin equivalent per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 米兰公国是北意大利最富庶的经济体之一，农业、丝织业、金属加工和金融活动均较发达。其财富基础来自波河平原高产农业与密集城市网络，但战争已开始扰动商业秩序。
gdpDescription.en: The Duchy of Milan was one of the wealthiest economies in northern Italy, with advanced agriculture, silk production, metalworking, and finance. Its wealth rested on the productive Po Valley and a dense urban network, though war was beginning to disrupt commercial stability.

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物农业、畜牧、丝织、毛纺、军械制造、金属加工、银行与转运贸易
mainIndustries.en: grain agriculture, livestock, silk weaving, wool textiles, armaments manufacture, metalworking, banking, and transit trade

tradeGoods.zh: 丝绸、毛织物、武器、盔甲、谷物、奶酪、酒、染料与奢侈工艺品
tradeGoods.en: silk, woolens, weapons, armor, grain, cheese, wine, dyes, and luxury craft goods

householdWealth.zh: 城市商人和手工业家庭财富显著高于乡村住户，贵族与银行家拥有大量地产和流动资本。普通农户多以土地使用权、牲畜和粮食储备构成主要财产。
householdWealth.en: Urban merchant and artisan households were considerably wealthier than rural households, while nobles and bankers held substantial land and liquid capital. Ordinary peasants derived most wealth from use-rights to land, livestock, and grain stores.

unit.en: silver florin equivalent per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以市场交换、行会规范、国家特许与地主地租并存的晚期中世纪—文艺复兴混合经济。
economicSystem.en: A late medieval-Renaissance mixed economy combining market exchange, guild regulation, state privilege, and landlord rents.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库仍具相当规模，但因持续战争准备、外交贿赂和雇佣军开支承受明显压力。公国需依赖短期借贷与预支税收维持流动性。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury remained substantial, but it was under clear pressure from war preparations, diplomatic payments, and mercenary costs. The duchy relied on short-term credit and advance taxation to maintain liquidity.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏向以高效征收城市与农业税源支撑军事与宫廷开支，并在危机时扩大借贷与非常税。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy aimed to sustain military and court expenditure through efficient extraction of urban and agrarian taxes, expanding loans and extraordinary levies during crises.

description.zh: 由贵族随从和职业佣兵组成，是传统意大利战争中的机动与冲击力量。
description.en: Made up of noble retinues and professional mercenaries, serving as the mobile striking arm of Italian warfare.

description.zh: 包括本地守军、弩手、火绳枪手以及外籍长枪兵，是守城和野战主力。
description.en: Included local garrisons, crossbowmen, arquebusiers, and foreign pikemen, forming the main force for siege defense and field operations.

description.zh: 负责火炮、攻城器材和筑城工程，体现米兰在军事工程上的优势。
description.en: Handled cannon, siege equipment, and fortification works, reflecting Milan's strength in military engineering.

commanderInChief.zh: 卢多维科·斯福尔扎公爵
commanderInChief.en: Duke Ludovico Sforza

technology.zh: 军队采用晚15世纪意大利炮兵、火绳枪、城堡改筑与佣兵战术结合的体系，在攻城、防御和工事技术上较先进。
technology.en: The army used a combination of late fifteenth-century Italian artillery, arquebuses, fortification redesign, and mercenary tactics, with relatively advanced siege, defensive, and engineering capabilities.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自法国王国、威尼斯共和国、瑞士雇佣兵势力及意大利战争带来的多方干涉。
threats.en: Major threats came from the Kingdom of France, the Republic of Venice, Swiss mercenary power, and the wider interventions of the Italian Wars.

populationDescription.zh: 人口集中于波河平原灌溉农业区和发达城镇带，城市密度高于大多数欧洲地区。瘟疫余波虽已减弱，但战争、税负和粮价波动持续影响民生。
populationDescription.en: The population was concentrated in the irrigated agricultural districts of the Po Valley and in a developed urban belt, with urban density higher than in most of Europe. The aftereffects of plague had lessened, but war, taxation, and grain-price volatility continued to affect daily life.

socialClasses.zh: 公爵家族与贵族、城市显贵与金融家、教士、行会工匠、小商人与店主、农民与雇农。
socialClasses.en: ducal family and nobility, urban patricians and financiers, clergy, guild artisans, petty merchants and shopkeepers, peasants and laborers

allies.zh: 同神圣罗马帝国皇帝、部分意大利诸邦及临时性的法国盟约保持变动联盟关系。
allies.en: Maintained shifting alliances with the Holy Roman Emperor, certain Italian states, and at times France.

enemies.zh: 威尼斯共和国、反斯福尔扎派系，以及在1499年前后入侵伦巴第的法国势力。
enemies.en: The Republic of Venice, anti-Sforza factions, and French forces invading Lombardy around 1499.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交上以维持伦巴第均势、借助大国干预制衡邻国、并确保斯福尔扎家族合法性为核心。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on maintaining the balance in Lombardy, using great-power intervention to offset neighbors, and securing the legitimacy of the Sforza dynasty.

era.zh: 欧洲文艺复兴晚期军事与艺术革新时代
era.en: Late Renaissance European age of military and artistic innovation

keyInnovations.zh: 火炮攻城技术、城防改筑、金属盔甲制造、透视绘画、宫廷工程学与水利改良。
keyInnovations.en: artillery siege methods, redesigned fortifications, advanced armor manufacture, perspective painting, court engineering, and hydraulic improvements

strengths.zh: 农业富庶、城市化程度高、手工业发达、财政基础较强，并拥有优良工程与炮兵传统。
strengths.en: Wealthy agriculture, high urbanization, strong manufacturing, a relatively solid fiscal base, and strong engineering and artillery traditions.

weaknesses.zh: 政权合法性脆弱，过度依赖雇佣军和宫廷政治，且处于大国争夺的战略要地。
weaknesses.en: Its legitimacy was fragile, it depended heavily on mercenaries and court politics, and it sat in a strategic zone contested by great powers.

outlook.zh: 短期内仍具资源与文化优势，但在意大利战争全面升级下，独立性极易被法国、帝国和邻邦力量侵蚀。
outlook.en: In the short term it retained significant resources and cultural prestige, but with the escalation of the Italian Wars its independence was highly vulnerable to France, the Empire, and neighboring powers.

description.zh: 米兰是北意大利军事与金融重镇，也是意大利战争核心战场之一。
description.en: Milan was a major military and financial center in northern Italy and one of the principal arenas of the Italian Wars.

rulerTitle.zh: 葡萄牙与阿尔加维国王
rulerTitle.en: King of Portugal and the Algarves

governmentForm.zh: 晚期中世纪至文艺复兴时期的世袭天主教君主制，结合王室议政会、贵族特权与不断扩张的王家官僚体系
governmentForm.en: A hereditary Catholic monarchy of the late medieval and Renaissance period, combining royal council government, noble privilege, and an expanding crown bureaucracy

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王室、世俗与教会贵族、城市精英、商人、工匠、农民以及海外据点中的混合社群构成；骑士贵族与教会拥有显著特权，但王权正借助城市、法学家与海贸利益集团加强集中化
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the crown, lay and ecclesiastical nobility, urban elites, merchants, artisans, peasants, and mixed communities in overseas outposts; the knightly nobility and clergy retained major privileges, but royal power was increasingly centralized through towns, jurists, and maritime commercial interests

rulingClass.zh: 国王、王室顾问、高级贵族、主教团、军事修会领袖以及掌控海贸与财政的王家官员
rulingClass.en: The king, royal councillors, high nobility, the episcopate, leaders of military orders, and crown officials controlling maritime trade and finance

succession.zh: 阿维什王朝的世袭君主继承制，以合法男性继承为优先，并由宫廷与贵族承认巩固
succession.en: Hereditary dynastic succession within the House of Aviz, favoring legitimate male inheritance and reinforced by court and noble recognition

structure.zh: 国家以国王为核心，由王室议政会、王室财政机构、司法机关、王家书记局及海外贸易管理机构共同运作。地方上依靠市镇自治机构、王室法官、地方长官和教会网络维持统治。1500年时，随着印度洋航路开辟，里斯本朝廷开始将海外贸易、海军事务与殖民据点管理纳入更直接的王室控制。
structure.en: The state was centered on the king and operated through the royal council, crown financial institutions, judicial bodies, royal chanceries, and overseas trade authorities. In the localities it relied on municipal corporations, royal judges, provincial officers, and church networks. By 1500, with the opening of the Indian Ocean route, the Lisbon court was beginning to bring overseas trade, naval affairs, and colonial strongholds under more direct royal supervision.

function.zh: 负责重大政策、外交、贵族协调、任命与王室顾问事务
function.en: Handled major policy, diplomacy, noble coordination, appointments, and royal advisory affairs

function.zh: 征收王室收入、管理关税、垄断利润、铸币与支出
function.en: Collected crown revenues and managed customs, monopoly income, coinage, and expenditure

function.zh: 起草敕令、保存档案、发布任命状和特许状
function.en: Drafted decrees, preserved archives, and issued appointments and charters

function.zh: 管理王国高等审判、上诉和王室司法监督
function.en: Administered high justice, appeals, and crown judicial oversight across the kingdom

function.zh: 组织远洋舰队、管理香料贸易、监督海外补给站与航海许可
function.en: Organized oceanic fleets, managed the spice trade, and supervised overseas supply stations and navigation licenses

function.zh: 征收港口税、检查货物、监管商船与进口商品
