culturalAchievements.zh: 瑞士邦联在公民兵传统、地方自治制度、城市工艺、跨山商贸文化和编年史书写方面颇具特色。15世纪末其军事声誉已成为欧洲政治文化中的重要符号。
culturalAchievements.en: The Swiss Confederation was notable for its militia tradition, local self-government, urban craftsmanship, transalpine commercial culture, and chronicle writing. By the late 15th century its military reputation had become a major symbol in European political culture.

languageFamily.zh: 主要为印欧语系日耳曼语族阿勒曼尼德语方言，部分地区使用罗曼语族语言
languageFamily.en: Primarily Indo-European Germanic Alemannic dialects, with Romance languages in some regions

philosophy.zh: 以基督教拉丁传统、自治共同体观念、行会伦理与公民军事精神为核心。
philosophy.en: Rooted in Christian Latin traditions, communal self-rule, guild ethics, and civic-military values.

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁字母，行政与学术中兼用拉丁文及德语方言书写。
writingSystem.en: Used the Latin alphabet, with Latin and German vernaculars employed in administration and scholarship.

unit.en: silver gulden equivalent per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 经济建立在高强度农牧业、城市手工业、跨阿尔卑斯贸易与雇佣兵收入之上。虽然自然资源有限，但交通位置优越、城市市场活跃，使其总量与人均产出均处于欧洲较高水平。
gdpDescription.en: The economy rested on intensive farming and herding, urban crafts, transalpine trade, and mercenary income. Though natural resources were limited, favorable transit geography and active urban markets placed both total and per capita output at a relatively high European level.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧与奶酪、谷物农业、纺织、金属加工、商路运输、佣兵服务
mainIndustries.en: Livestock and cheese production, grain farming, textiles, metalworking, transit trade, and mercenary service

tradeGoods.zh: 牛畜、奶酪、皮革、布匹、金属器、盐、葡萄酒转运、武器
tradeGoods.en: Cattle, cheese, leather, cloth, metal goods, salt, re-exported wine, and weapons

name.zh: 古尔登与地方银币并用

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富体现在耕地、牧场、牲畜、作坊工具、城内房产与行会资格。许多家庭还通过海外佣兵服役和汇款积累现金。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was embodied in farmland, alpine pasture, livestock, workshop tools, urban property, and guild membership. Many families also accumulated cash through foreign mercenary service and remittances.

unit.en: silver gulden equivalent per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 以自治州市场经济、行会监管、乡村共有权与跨国劳务输出并存的混合经济。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy combining cantonal market structures, guild regulation, rural commons, and transnational labor export.

source.zh: 市场税、盐税与城市消费税
source.en: Market taxes, salt dues, and urban excises

source.zh: 盟邦分摊与军事相关收入

category.en: Administration and justice in common territories
Road, bridge, and alpine pass maintenance

treasuryDescription.zh: 财库分散于各州与共同基金之中，包括银币储备、粮秣、军械与债权。其优势是地方财政韧性较强，缺点是联邦集中调度能力有限。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was dispersed across cantonal and common funds and included silver reserves, provisions, arms, and receivables. Its strength was strong local fiscal resilience, while its weakness was limited centralized coordination.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体审慎，强调平衡预算、维护交通与边防，并避免建立过重的中央税负。重大军事行动通常依赖州际协商加征。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally cautious, emphasizing balanced budgets, maintenance of transit routes and defenses, and avoidance of a heavy central tax burden. Major military efforts usually relied on negotiated extraordinary levies.

description.zh: 以长枪与戟兵为核心，是瑞士军事实力与欧洲声望的主要来源。
description.en: Centered on pikemen and halberdiers, this was the chief source of Swiss military strength and European prestige.

description.zh: 由各州征召，承担守备、山地作战与支援任务，包含弩手和早期火器手。
description.en: Raised by the cantons, they handled garrison duty, mountain warfare, and support tasks, including crossbowmen and early handgunners.

description.zh: 规模较小，主要用于侦察、联络与追击，不是作战主力。
description.en: Small in scale, used mainly for reconnaissance, liaison, and pursuit rather than as the main striking force.

commanderInChief.zh: 联邦议会任命的诸州统帅
commanderInChief.en: Cantonal commanders appointed through the Federal Diet

technology.zh: 军事技术处于欧洲先进水平，擅长长枪密集阵、山地机动、纪律化民兵与日益增长的火器运用。虽然重骑兵较弱，但步兵战术在1499年后的欧洲仍极具威慑力。
technology.en: Military technology stood at an advanced European level, marked by dense pike formations, mountain mobility, disciplined militia forces, and growing use of firearms. Though weaker in heavy cavalry, Swiss infantry tactics remained highly intimidating in Europe after 1499.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自哈布斯堡势力、意大利战争中的外部牵连、州际宗教与利益分歧，以及对佣兵收入的过度依赖。
threats.en: Main threats came from Habsburg power, entanglement in the Italian Wars, inter-cantonal religious and interest divisions, and overreliance on mercenary income.

populationDescription.zh: 人口分布于高地乡村、山谷聚落和若干繁荣城市，整体密度中等但区域差异明显。城市虽非绝对多数，却在政治、工商业与文化上具有主导作用。
populationDescription.en: Population was spread across upland countryside, valley settlements, and several prosperous towns, with moderate overall density but strong regional variation. Cities were not an absolute majority, yet they played a dominant role in politics, commerce, and culture.

socialClasses.zh: 城市执政家族与行会精英、自由农民、公民工匠、牧民、雇佣兵、佃户与贫民
socialClasses.en: Urban governing families and guild elites, free peasants, citizen artisans, herders, mercenaries, tenants, and the poor

allies.zh: 与部分德意志诸邦、法兰西王室及若干意大利城邦保持务实结盟或佣兵协作关系。
allies.en: Maintained pragmatic alliances or mercenary cooperation with some German states, the French crown, and certain Italian city-states.

enemies.zh: 与哈布斯堡家族长期对立，并在意大利战争中面临法、米兰、神圣罗马帝国等多方复杂敌友转换。
enemies.en: Long opposed the Habsburg dynasty and, in the Italian Wars, faced shifting enmities and alignments involving France, Milan, and the Holy Roman Empire.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以保卫自治、控制阿尔卑斯通道、扩大邦联影响并从欧洲战争中获取安全与收益为核心。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on defending autonomy, controlling Alpine passes, expanding confederal influence, and deriving security and profit from wider European wars.

era.zh: 文艺复兴时期阿尔卑斯共和邦联

keyInnovations.zh: 长枪方阵战术、州级民兵制度、山口交通管理、城市行会制造和印刷文化传播。
keyInnovations.en: Pike-square tactics, cantonal militia institutions, alpine transit management, urban guild manufacturing, and the spread of print culture.

strengths.zh: 军事实力强、地方自治传统深厚、财政稳健、商路位置优越，且政治韧性高。
strengths.en: It possessed strong military capability, deep traditions of self-rule, sound finances, advantageous trade geography, and high political resilience.

weaknesses.zh: 邦联体制分散、协调成本高、内部差异明显，并易受外部战争与佣兵政治牵动。
weaknesses.en: The confederal system was fragmented, costly to coordinate, internally diverse, and easily drawn into external wars and mercenary politics.

outlook.zh: 1500年前后的瑞士邦联正处扩张与声望高峰，但若在意大利战场遭遇重大挫折，其对外进取将趋于谨慎并更重视内部整合。
outlook.en: Around 1500 the Swiss Confederation stood near the peak of its expansion and prestige, but major setbacks in Italy would likely make its foreign policy more cautious and increase emphasis on internal consolidation.

description.zh: 瑞士邦联是由自治州联合而成、以强大步兵传统、山口贸易与地方共和制度闻名的繁荣阿尔卑斯政体。
description.en: The Swiss Confederation was a prosperous Alpine polity of self-governing cantons renowned for its powerful infantry tradition, pass trade, and republican local institutions.

governmentForm.zh: 卡尔马联盟在1500年前后名义上是由丹麦、挪威和瑞典共奉一君的复合君主制，但实际统治权主要掌握在丹麦王室手中。
governmentForm.en: Around 1500, the Kalmar Union was nominally a composite monarchy uniting Denmark, Norway, and Sweden under one crown, though effective power was concentrated largely in the Danish monarchy.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由贵族、教士、市民与农民构成，且各王国的等级结构并不完全相同。丹麦与挪威王权较强，而瑞典地方贵族与矿业利益集团在政治上更具独立性。农民在北欧社会中比西欧许多地区保有更多法律地位，但税役负担仍然沉重。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of nobles, clergy, burghers, and peasants, with somewhat different hierarchies in each kingdom. Royal authority was stronger in Denmark and Norway, while in Sweden local nobles and mining interests retained greater political autonomy. Peasants in Scandinavia preserved more legal standing than in many parts of Western Europe, though tax and labor burdens remained heavy.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要是丹麦王室、枢密院贵族以及高级教士。联盟内部的重要职位和资源分配常引发丹麦与瑞典贵族之间的紧张关系。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class was composed chiefly of the Danish royal house, aristocrats in the royal councils, and senior clergy. Competition over offices and resources frequently sharpened tensions between Danish and Swedish elites.

succession.zh: 王位继承原则上依各国承认的君主继承与选举传统相结合，由贵族会议与枢密院承认君主。由于联盟是复合王权，继承往往伴随各王国分别确认，增加了不稳定性。
succession.en: Succession rested on a combination of dynastic inheritance and aristocratic recognition, with councils and estates acknowledging the monarch. Because the union was a composite crown, succession often required separate confirmation in each kingdom, increasing instability.

structure.zh: 联盟没有完全统一的中央官僚机构，而是以丹麦王廷为核心，分别统治丹麦、挪威和名义上的瑞典。重大事务由国王、枢密院和各地贵族会议协商处理，地方差异极大。由于瑞典反抗加剧，1500年前后的联盟政体已呈松散和危机化状态。
structure.en: The union lacked a fully unified central bureaucracy and was governed from the Danish royal court, which ruled Denmark, Norway, and nominally Sweden through parallel institutions. Major affairs were handled through the king, royal councils, and regional estates, with large local variations. By around 1500, growing Swedish resistance had already made the union politically loose and crisis-prone.

function.zh: 协助国王处理立法、封臣关系、外交与高层任命。
function.en: Assisted the king in legislation, noble relations, diplomacy, and major appointments.

function.zh: 管理王室领地收入、关税、铸币与军费拨付。
function.en: Managed crown lands, customs revenue, minting, and military disbursements.

function.zh: 负责敕令起草、档案保存、王室通信和印玺管理。
function.en: Handled royal decrees, archives, correspondence, and the royal seal.

function.zh: 征收海峡通行费与港口税，并监督王室城堡和地方守备。
function.en: Collected Sound dues and port taxes while overseeing royal castles and local garrisons.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依靠封地贵族、城堡总管、主教区和城市自治机构共同运行。丹麦与挪威的王室控制较稳固，瑞典则更多依赖地方贵族妥协。
localAdmin.en: Local administration relied on nobles, castle governors, bishoprics, and urban self-governing bodies. Crown control was firmer in Denmark and Norway, while Sweden required greater compromise with local aristocrats.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以各王国的习惯法、城市法与教会法并存为特征。国王通过敕令和法庭影响司法，但并未形成统一的联盟法典。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined the customary laws of each kingdom, urban law, and canon law. The king influenced justice through decrees and courts, but no uniform union-wide code existed.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政主要来自王室领地、港口和海峡关税、采矿收益以及对农民和城市征收的直接税。瑞典的税收征集尤其受地方政治与矿区利益制约。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from crown lands, port and Sound customs, mining income, and direct taxes on peasants and towns. In Sweden especially, tax collection was constrained by local politics and mining interests.

religion.zh: 天主教
religion.en: Catholicism

culturalAchievements.zh: 北欧在教会建筑、木构工艺、航海传统与编年史写作方面持续发展。哥本哈根等城市逐渐成为贸易与王权文化中心，但联盟内部政治紧张抑制了更广泛的文化整合。
culturalAchievements.en: Scandinavia continued to develop in ecclesiastical architecture, woodworking, seafaring traditions, and chronicle writing. Cities such as Copenhagen increasingly served as commercial and royal cultural centers, though political tensions within the union hindered broader cultural integration.

languageFamily.zh: 北日耳曼语支
languageFamily.en: North Germanic

philosophy.zh: 晚期中世纪天主教经院思想与王权实用主义并存
philosophy.en: Late medieval Catholic scholasticism combined with pragmatic royal statecraft

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母；行政、教会和学术常用拉丁文，日常与地方文书使用丹麦语、瑞典语和挪威语
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet; Latin was common in administration, church, and scholarship, while Danish, Swedish, and Norwegian were used in daily and local records

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 联盟经济以农业、渔业、林业、海运和波罗的海贸易为基础。丹麦控制厄勒海峡带来重要关税收入，而瑞典的铜铁矿业是最有价值的生产部门之一。
gdpDescription.en: The union economy rested on agriculture, fisheries, forestry, shipping, and Baltic trade. Danish control of the Øresund generated important customs revenue, while Swedish copper and iron mining was among its most valuable productive sectors.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、渔业、木材、造船、矿业、海运贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, fishing, timber, shipbuilding, mining, and maritime trade

tradeGoods.zh: 谷物、黄油、鱼干、木材、焦油、铁、铜、兽皮
tradeGoods.en: Grain, butter, dried fish, timber, tar, iron, copper, and furs

householdWealth.zh: 普通家庭财富以土地使用权、牲畜、渔具和木材储备体现，城市商人则持有船只、仓储和银币。整体财富分布不均，贵族和教会掌握大量地产。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was usually held in land-use rights, livestock, fishing gear, and timber stocks, while urban merchants held ships, warehouses, and silver coin. Wealth was unevenly distributed, with nobles and the church controlling extensive landed assets.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person per year
grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 以农业和领地收入为基础、受王室关税和汉萨贸易网络深刻影响的区域性混合经济
economicSystem.en: A regional mixed economy based on agriculture and landed income, deeply shaped by royal customs and Hanseatic trade networks

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库仍有一定储备，但长期维持海军、城堡和联盟统治成本高昂。瑞典局势恶化使财政弹性下降。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury retained some reserves, but sustaining the fleet, castles, and the union itself was expensive. Deteriorating conditions in Sweden reduced fiscal flexibility.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 王室倾向依靠关税、领地收益和临时加征来维持统治，并在必要时举债。财政政策重在保住海峡控制权和应对联盟内部分裂。
fiscalPolicy.en: The crown relied on customs, domain income, and extraordinary levies to sustain rule, resorting to borrowing when necessary. Fiscal policy centered on preserving control of the straits and managing internal disunion.

description.zh: 由贵族供养的骑兵和精锐随从构成，是野战中的核心机动力量。
description.en: Composed of noble-supported cavalry and elite retainers, forming the core mobile force in field warfare.

description.zh: 来自农民、市民和地方征募，承担守城、野战与后勤任务。
description.en: Raised from peasants, burghers, and local levies, serving in garrison, field, and logistical roles.

description.zh: 负责海峡巡逻、运兵和海上封锁，是丹麦王权的重要支柱。
description.en: Responsible for patrolling the straits, transporting troops, and enforcing blockades, and a key pillar of Danish royal power.

commanderInChief.zh: 汉斯国王
commanderInChief.en: King Hans

technology.zh: 军队使用晚期中世纪火炮、弩与长柄武器，海军在北海和波罗的海条件下具备较强运输和近岸作战能力，但军制仍偏向封建与临时征召。
technology.en: The military employed late medieval artillery, crossbows, and polearms, while the navy had solid transport and littoral capabilities in the North and Baltic seas, though the military system remained heavily feudal and ad hoc.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自瑞典分离势力、北德贸易竞争、以及波罗的海地区权力平衡变化。内部不忠和后勤距离比外敌更危险。
threats.en: The chief threats came from Swedish separatism, North German commercial rivalry, and shifts in the Baltic balance of power. Internal disloyalty and logistical distance were often more dangerous than foreign enemies.

populationDescription.zh: 联盟人口分布稀疏，绝大多数居住在农村、沿海渔村和小型市场城镇。丹麦人口密度较高，瑞典和挪威则更分散，地理环境使行政与征税成本上升。
populationDescription.en: The union's population was thinly distributed, with most people living in rural districts, fishing settlements, and small market towns. Denmark was more densely populated, while Sweden and Norway were more dispersed, raising the costs of administration and taxation.

socialClasses.zh: 贵族、教士、市民、自由农民与佃农并存，各地差异明显
socialClasses.en: Nobles, clergy, burghers, free peasants, and tenant farmers coexisted, with marked regional variation

allies.zh: 与部分德意志商人城市和天主教君主保持务实关系；挪威和丹麦境内主教集团通常支持王权。
allies.en: It maintained pragmatic relations with some German commercial cities and Catholic rulers; bishoprics in Denmark and Norway generally supported royal authority.

enemies.zh: 瑞典反联盟派贵族、部分汉萨势力，以及任何挑战丹麦海峡控制权的波罗的海竞争者。
enemies.en: Its enemies included anti-union Swedish nobles, elements of the Hanseatic world, and Baltic competitors challenging Danish control of the straits.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交目标是维持厄勒海峡主导地位、压制瑞典分离、并在北欧保持王室优先权。其政策带有强烈的海上贸易与区域霸权色彩。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy aimed to preserve dominance over the Øresund, suppress Swedish separation, and maintain royal primacy in Scandinavia. It had a strongly maritime and regional-hegemonic character.

era.zh: 欧洲文艺复兴早期至晚期中世纪北欧过渡阶段
era.en: Early Renaissance Europe in a Scandinavian late medieval transition

keyInnovations.zh: 改进型火炮、北方海运船舶、矿冶技术、王室文书制度与港口税收管理
keyInnovations.en: Improved artillery, northern seagoing vessels, mining and metallurgical techniques, royal chancery practices, and port customs administration

strengths.zh: 控制关键海峡、拥有可观海运能力，并掌握北欧资源与矿产网络。丹麦王室在财政和海军方面仍具相对优势。
strengths.en: It controlled key straits, possessed significant maritime capacity, and commanded Nordic resource and mining networks. The Danish crown still retained relative strengths in finance and naval power.

weaknesses.zh: 联盟缺乏牢固政治整合，瑞典贵族反抗持续，地方法制和财政结构碎片化。王权虽强于单一北方王国，但不足以长期压制离心势力。
weaknesses.en: The union lacked firm political integration, faced persistent Swedish aristocratic resistance, and suffered from fragmented legal and fiscal structures. Royal power was stronger than that of any single Nordic kingdom, but insufficient to suppress centrifugal forces indefinitely.

outlook.zh: 若不能稳定瑞典局势并深化制度整合，联盟很可能继续衰落并走向实际解体。
outlook.en: Unless it stabilized Sweden and deepened institutional integration, the union was likely to continue declining toward effective dissolution.

description.zh: 1500年前后的卡尔马联盟是一个由丹麦主导、依赖海峡贸易与王室权威维系、但因瑞典离心而日益衰落的北欧复合君主国。
description.en: Around 1500, the Kalmar Union was a Danish-led composite monarchy sustained by strait trade and royal authority, yet increasingly weakened by Swedish centrifugal resistance.

dynasty.en: Monastic rule of the Teutonic Order

governmentForm.zh: 1500年前后的条顿骑士团国家是由军事修会统治的神权政体，其世俗领地以宗教誓愿和骑士团法统为合法性基础。
governmentForm.en: Around 1500, the Teutonic state was a theocratic polity ruled by a military monastic order, whose secular territories derived legitimacy from religious vows and the legal tradition of the order.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由骑士团成员、教士、德意志和普鲁士城市市民、乡村农民以及少量本地旧贵族构成。骑士团成员处于顶层，但其数量有限，必须依赖城市和庄园经济维持统治。随着对波兰的长期战争失利，地方城市与贵族要求更多自治。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of members of the order, clergy, German and Prussian townspeople, rural peasants, and a smaller native noble element. The brethren stood at the top, but their numbers were limited and they depended on urban and estate economies to sustain rule. After long military setbacks against Poland, towns and nobles pressed for greater autonomy.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层是大团长、领区总管、修会骑士及高级教会人士。虽然名义上神权色彩浓厚，但实际行政越来越依靠受薪文官与城市精英。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of the Grand Master, territorial commanders, knight-brethren, and senior ecclesiastics. Though formally theocratic, practical administration increasingly relied on salaried officials and urban elites.

succession.zh: 大团长由骑士团内部选举产生，并由高级成员会议确认。此种选举制提高了修会合法性，但在外部压力下也容易造成政策保守与迟缓。
succession.en: The Grand Master was elected within the order and confirmed by senior brethren. This elective system strengthened monastic legitimacy, but under external pressure it could also produce conservative and slow decision-making.

structure.zh: 条顿骑士团国家以修会层级和领地行政结合运作，大团长驻于柯尼斯堡并通过各总管区统治剩余普鲁士领地。修会纪律、城堡网络和文书机构共同维持统治，但在第二次托伦和约后其权力已明显收缩。1500年前后，该政体已受制于波兰宗主权与财政困境。
structure.en: The Teutonic state operated through a combination of monastic hierarchy and territorial administration, with the Grand Master at Königsberg ruling the remaining Prussian lands through commanderies and districts. Rule was upheld by order discipline, a castle network, and chancery administration, but its power had markedly contracted after the Second Peace of Thorn. By around 1500, the polity was constrained by Polish suzerainty and fiscal weakness.

function.zh: 制定重大军事、外交与领地政策，并协调修会高级成员。
function.en: Set major military, diplomatic, and territorial policy and coordinated senior members of the order.

function.zh: 处理敕令、条约、领地档案与对外通信。
function.en: Handled decrees, treaties, territorial archives, and foreign correspondence.

function.zh: 征收租税、管理庄园收入、支付贡赋并监督铸币与债务。
function.en: Collected taxes, managed estate income, paid tribute, and supervised minting and debt.

function.zh: 维护城堡、火炮、佣兵合同和边境守备。
function.en: Maintained castles, artillery, mercenary contracts, and frontier garrisons.

localAdmin.zh: 地方由总管区、城堡总监和城市议会共同治理，修会领主权与城市自治并存。随着权力衰退，地方城市和领主对行政影响不断上升。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was shared among commandery districts, castle overseers, and town councils, combining monastic lordship with urban self-government. As the order weakened, local towns and landed interests gained growing influence.

legalSystem.zh: 法律结合骑士团规章、德意志城市法、封建习惯和教会法。城市多依库尔姆法等德意志法系自治，而修会法庭处理领地与军事事务。
legalSystem.en: Law combined the order's statutes, German urban law, feudal custom, and canon law. Many towns enjoyed self-government under Kulm and related German laws, while order courts handled territorial and military affairs.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收来自庄园地租、城市税、磨坊和盐税、贸易关卡以及对属民征发。对波兰负担的贡赋与军费使税制日益沉重。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from estate rents, urban taxes, mill and salt dues, trade tolls, and levies on dependents. Tribute obligations to Poland and military costs made the tax system increasingly burdensome.

religion.zh: 天主教
religion.en: Catholicism

culturalAchievements.zh: 骑士团国家留下了密集的砖砌哥特式城堡、教堂和城市规划传统。虽然1500年前后文化创造力已不及鼎盛时期，但其文书管理和防御建筑仍具区域代表性。
culturalAchievements.en: The Teutonic state bequeathed a dense landscape of brick Gothic castles, churches, and urban planning traditions. Although its cultural vitality had declined by 1500, its documentary administration and defensive architecture remained regionally distinctive.

languageFamily.zh: 行政主导语言属西日耳曼语支；地方另有波罗的语与斯拉夫语成分
languageFamily.en: The main administrative language belonged to the West Germanic family, alongside local Baltic and Slavic elements

philosophy.zh: 天主教军事修会精神、经院神学与德意志城市法文化
philosophy.en: Catholic military-monastic ethos, scholastic theology, and German urban legal culture

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母；拉丁文用于教会和外交，德语用于大量行政和城市文书
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet; Latin was used in church and diplomacy, while German was widely used in administration and urban records

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 骑士团残余领地经济以庄园农业、琥珀与木材贸易、谷物出口和港口转运为核心。尽管人口不多，但普鲁士港口和德意志城市传统使其人均产出仍高于许多东欧内陆地区。
gdpDescription.en: The economy of the order's remaining lands centered on estate agriculture, amber and timber trade, grain exports, and port transshipment. Though small in population, Prussian ports and German urban traditions kept per-capita output above many inland parts of Eastern Europe.

mainIndustries.zh: 庄园农业、谷物贸易、琥珀加工、木材、酿造、港口商业
mainIndustries.en: Estate agriculture, grain trade, amber working, timber, brewing, and port commerce

tradeGoods.zh: 谷物、琥珀、木材、蜡、毛皮、啤酒、盐
tradeGoods.en: Grain, amber, timber, wax, furs, beer, and salt

householdWealth.zh: 乡村财富主要表现为耕地、牲畜和粮食储备，城市居民则拥有作坊、仓库和贸易资本。骑士团及附属修会地产仍掌握大量固定资产。
householdWealth.en: Rural wealth lay chiefly in arable land, livestock, and grain stocks, while townspeople held workshops, warehouses, and trade capital. The order and its dependent ecclesiastical estates still controlled substantial fixed assets.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person per year
grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 以修会领地和城市贸易共同支撑的半庄园化、半商业化区域经济
economicSystem.en: A semi-manorial, semi-commercial regional economy supported jointly by monastic estates and urban trade

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库规模有限，且受到贡赋、债务和佣兵支出的持续压力。财政上虽未立即崩溃，但缺乏长期战略余裕。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was limited in size and under constant pressure from tribute, debt, and mercenary costs. It was not in immediate collapse, but lacked long-term strategic flexibility.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 骑士团通过强化领地征收、榨取城市税源和控制港口贸易来维持财政，并尽量避免与波兰再度全面战争。其财政政策带有明显守成和应急性质。
fiscalPolicy.en: The order sustained its finances by tightening estate extraction, drawing more from towns, and controlling port trade while trying to avoid renewed full-scale war with Poland. Its fiscal policy was notably defensive and improvised.

description.zh: 由修会核心成员和附属骑兵组成，仍具象征性与战术冲击力，但规模远不如鼎盛时期。
description.en: Formed by the core brethren and associated cavalry, it retained symbolic and tactical shock value but was far smaller than in the order's heyday.

description.zh: 由城市民兵、征募兵和守备队构成，负责防御城堡、道路和港口。
description.en: Composed of urban militia, levies, and garrison troops, tasked with defending castles, roads, and ports.

description.zh: 雇佣专业炮手和步兵以弥补修会成员不足，是后期军事体系的重要组成部分。
description.en: Professional gunners and hired infantry were employed to offset the shortage of brethren and became a vital part of the late military system.

commanderInChief.zh: 条顿骑士团大团长腓特烈·冯·萨克森
commanderInChief.en: Grand Master Frederick of Saxony

technology.zh: 条顿骑士团仍保有坚固砖砌要塞、火炮和成熟的围城防御经验，但机动作战与大规模野战能力已不如15世纪初。对佣兵和城堡火力的依赖日益加深。
technology.en: The Teutonic Order still possessed strong brick fortresses, artillery, and seasoned siege-defense expertise, but its mobile and large-scale field capabilities were weaker than in the early fifteenth century. Dependence on mercenaries and fortress firepower kept increasing.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自波兰王国和立陶宛相关势力的政治压制，以及内部财政脆弱和地方离心。其最大危险并非单次战败，而是长期失去主权空间。
threats.en: The principal threats came from political pressure by the Kingdom of Poland and Lithuanian-linked forces, alongside internal fiscal fragility and local centrifugal tendencies. Its gravest danger was not one defeat, but the gradual loss of sovereign room for action.

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中在普鲁士沿海和若干城市节点，农村人口服务于庄园与谷物出口。城市化水平在东欧边缘地区中相对较高，但总体人口基数很小。
populationDescription.en: Population was concentrated in coastal Prussia and a few urban nodes, while rural communities supported manorial agriculture and grain export. Urbanization was relatively high for the eastern Baltic frontier, but the total population base was small.

socialClasses.zh: 修会骑士、教士、城市市民、地方贵族、农民与佃户
socialClasses.en: Knight-brethren, clergy, urban burghers, local nobles, peasants, and tenants

allies.zh: 与部分德意志诸侯和神圣罗马帝国圈层保持宗教与政治联系，但实际支持有限。
allies.en: It maintained religious and political links with some German princes and the Holy Roman imperial sphere, though practical support was limited.

enemies.zh: 波兰王国是最主要的政治对手；与波罗的海周边城市和邻邦也常因贸易、边界和宗主权问题发生摩擦。
enemies.en: The Kingdom of Poland was its principal political adversary; tensions also arose with Baltic towns and neighboring powers over trade, borders, and overlordship.

foreignPolicy.zh: 其外交目标是在不利的力量对比下尽量保存修会自治、争取帝国和教廷支持，并避免被完全吸收。政策以守势和法理申诉为主。
foreignPolicy.en: Its foreign policy sought to preserve as much autonomy as possible under unfavorable power balances, win support from the Empire and papacy, and avoid full absorption. It was primarily defensive and legalistic.

era.zh: 东波罗的海晚期中世纪向文艺复兴早期过渡
era.en: Eastern Baltic transition from the late Middle Ages to the early Renaissance

keyInnovations.zh: 砖砌堡垒体系、围城火炮、城市文书管理、港口贸易组织和谷物出口物流
keyInnovations.en: Brick fortress systems, siege artillery, urban documentary administration, port trade organization, and grain-export logistics

strengths.zh: 拥有成熟的城堡防御体系、纪律化的修会传统和较发达的港口城市经济。其行政文书能力和地方组织仍相当有效。
strengths.en: It possessed a mature castle-defense system, disciplined monastic traditions, and a relatively developed port-city economy. Its administrative documentary capacity and territorial organization remained fairly effective.

weaknesses.zh: 领土缩小、财政紧张、外受波兰压制、内缺人口和骑士团成员补充。传统军事修会模式已难适应近代国家竞争。
weaknesses.en: Its territory was reduced, finances strained, and it faced Polish pressure abroad while lacking population and replenishment of brethren at home. The traditional military-monastic model was increasingly ill-suited to emerging state competition.

outlook.zh: 若无强力外援或内部世俗化改革，骑士团国家很可能继续衰退并最终转化为世俗公国。
outlook.en: Without strong outside aid or internal secularizing reform, the Teutonic state was likely to continue declining and eventually transform into a secular duchy.

description.zh: 1500年前后的条顿骑士团是一个仍以城堡、修会纪律和港口贸易维系统治、但在波兰压力下明显走向衰落的东波罗的海神权国家。
description.en: Around 1500, the Teutonic Knights remained an eastern Baltic theocratic state sustained by castles, monastic discipline, and port trade, yet clearly declining under Polish pressure.

governmentForm.zh: 1500年前后的纳瓦拉王国是一个位于比利牛斯山两侧、由国王与等级会议共同运作的中小型封建君主国。
governmentForm.en: Around 1500, the Kingdom of Navarre was a small feudal monarchy straddling both sides of the Pyrenees and governed through cooperation between the crown and representative estates.

socialStructure.zh: 纳瓦拉社会由王室、贵族、教士、城市居民和乡村农民组成，山地社区保有较强地方传统。王国人口不多，但地区差异明显，北部与南部在语言、法律和经济结构上各有特色。边境位置使军事贵族和要塞城镇在社会中占据突出地位。
socialStructure.en: Navarrese society was made up of the monarchy, nobility, clergy, townspeople, and rural peasants, with mountain communities preserving strong local traditions. The kingdom was small in population but regionally diverse, with distinct linguistic, legal, and economic patterns north and south of the Pyrenees. Its frontier position gave military nobles and fortified towns an outsized role in society.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层包括国王、宫廷贵族、高级教士和代表主要城市的寡头精英。由于夹在法兰西与卡斯蒂利亚之间，王室统治高度依赖贵族平衡与外交手腕。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class included the king, court nobility, senior clergy, and oligarchic elites representing major towns. Positioned between France and Castile, the crown depended heavily on balancing nobles and exercising diplomatic skill.

succession.zh: 纳瓦拉承认王室血统继承，并由王国等级与政治共同体予以认可。由于外部强权干预，继承常带有国际政治色彩，容易引发争议。
succession.en: Navarre recognized dynastic succession, with the estates and political community confirming the ruler. Because external great powers intervened, succession often carried an international political dimension and could become contentious.

structure.zh: 纳瓦拉王国的政府以国王、王室议会和王国等级机构为核心，规模虽小但法律传统较强。王权通过财政官、司法官和地方总督管理边境城镇与乡村谷地。由于地处法西两强之间，政府决策常优先考虑防务与外交生存。
structure.en: Navarre's government centered on the king, the royal council, and the estates of the realm, and though small in scale it possessed strong legal traditions. Royal officials, judges, and local governors managed frontier towns and rural valleys. Situated between France and Spain, government decision-making often prioritized defense and diplomatic survival.

function.zh: 协助国王处理政务、外交、封臣关系与紧急军事决策。
function.en: Assisted the king in state affairs, diplomacy, vassal relations, and urgent military decisions.

function.zh: 征收关税、地租、间接税并管理王室支出。
function.en: Collected customs, rents, and indirect taxes while managing royal expenditure.

function.zh: 负责法庭运作、王室文书、契约认证和印玺事务。
function.en: Oversaw courts, royal documentation, contract authentication, and seal affairs.

function.zh: 管理山口防务、驻军供给和地方守备体系。
function.en: Managed pass defenses, garrison supply, and local defensive systems.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政通过城镇议会、山谷共同体和王室任命官员共同实施。许多地区保留特权和地方法，王权必须与地方机构协商施政。
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through town councils, valley communities, and crown-appointed officials. Many districts retained privileges and local law, requiring the monarchy to govern through negotiation.

legalSystem.zh: 纳瓦拉以王国特权法、习惯法和罗马-教会法传统并存为特征。王国政治身份部分建立在维护地方特权与古老法权之上。
legalSystem.en: Navarre was characterized by a coexistence of royal fueros, customary law, and Romano-canon legal traditions. Part of the kingdom's political identity rested on preserving local privileges and historic rights.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收主要来自关卡与贸易税、王室地产收入、城市贡赋和临时军事征收。由于国土狭小且贵族特权较多，财政基础相对脆弱。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation came mainly from tolls and trade duties, crown-domain income, urban contributions, and extraordinary military levies. Because the realm was small and noble privileges extensive, its fiscal base was relatively fragile.

religion.zh: 天主教
religion.en: Catholicism

culturalAchievements.zh: 纳瓦拉在王国法制、边境城镇文化和宗教建筑方面具有自身传统。其文化重要性更多体现在法权延续、巴斯克与罗曼语言共存，以及比利牛斯交通枢纽地位上。
culturalAchievements.en: Navarre possessed its own traditions in royal law, frontier urban culture, and religious architecture. Its cultural significance lay more in legal continuity, coexistence of Basque and Romance languages, and its role as a Pyrenean transit zone.

languageFamily.zh: 巴斯克语孤立语与罗曼语族并存
languageFamily.en: A coexistence of the Basque language isolate and Romance languages

philosophy.zh: 天主教君主政治、法权传统与比利牛斯地方共同体观念并存
philosophy.en: Catholic monarchic politics combined with legalist traditions and Pyrenean communalism

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母；行政与法律文书使用拉丁文、罗曼斯语和部分巴斯克语环境下的地方记录
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet; administration and legal records used Latin, Romance languages, and local documentation in a Basque-speaking environment

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 纳瓦拉经济规模不大，但因控制比利牛斯山交通线、牧业资源和部分葡萄酒与手工业而具有区域活力。其经济深受邻近卡斯蒂利亚、阿拉贡和法国市场影响。
gdpDescription.en: Navarre's economy was modest in scale, but its control of Pyrenean routes, pastoral resources, and some wine and craft production gave it regional vitality. Its economy was strongly influenced by neighboring Castilian, Aragonese, and French markets.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、牧羊业、葡萄种植、皮革、铁器手工业、山地贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, sheep raising, viticulture, leatherworking, iron crafts, and mountain trade

tradeGoods.zh: 羊毛、牲畜、葡萄酒、皮革、铁制品、谷物、盐
tradeGoods.en: Wool, livestock, wine, leather, iron goods, grain, and salt

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富多体现在小块耕地、羊群、葡萄园和房屋，城镇中则包括商铺和作坊。总体而言，中小地产者多于巨富，但贵族和教会仍占有最优土地。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was mainly held in small plots, flocks, vineyards, and houses, while towns also contained shops and workshops. Overall, middling smallholders were more common than great magnates, though nobles and the church still held the best lands.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person per year
grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 以山地农业与牧业为本、依赖跨境关贸和地方特权调节的小型封建商业经济
economicSystem.en: A small feudal-commercial economy rooted in mountain agriculture and pastoralism, regulated through cross-border tolls and local privileges

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
grams of silver equivalent per year
