threats.zh: 欧洲疫病和殖民者接触。
threats.en: European diseases and colonizer contact.

populationDescription.zh: 密西西比河中下游流域。
populationDescription.en: Middle and lower Mississippi River basin.

socialClasses.zh: 首领家族、长老、自由成员、依附者。
socialClasses.en: Chiefly families, elders, free members, dependents.

allies.zh: 无固定盟国，依赖亲缘和交换伙伴形成临时联盟。
allies.en: No fixed allies; temporary alliances formed through kin ties and exchange partners.

enemies.zh: 无持久性敌国，但邻近群体间常有资源争夺。
enemies.en: No permanent enemies, though resource competition with neighboring groups was common.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护领地安全与交换关系为先。
foreignPolicy.en: Policy prioritized territorial security and exchange relationships.

era.zh: 新石器至早期部族阶段

keyInnovations.zh: 玉米农业、土丘建造。
keyInnovations.en: Maize agriculture, mound building.

strengths.zh: 农业成熟，有等级组织。
strengths.en: Mature agriculture, hierarchical organization.

weaknesses.zh: 正在衰落，面临欧洲冲击。
weaknesses.en: Declining, facing European impact.

outlook.zh: 将被殖民浪潮彻底改变。
outlook.en: Would be transformed by colonization.

description.zh: 1500年密西西比文化衰落后的继承酋邦群。
description.en: Successor chiefdoms of the declining Mississippian culture in 1500.

governmentForm.zh: 神圣罗马帝国内的世袭公国，以公爵为最高统治者，受帝国法律和等级议会制约
governmentForm.en: A hereditary duchy within the Holy Roman Empire, ruled by the duke but constrained by imperial law and the estates assembly

socialStructure.zh: 社会由公爵家族与高级贵族、教会高层、骑士阶层、城市市民与商人、农民和农奴构成。等级议会在政治中发挥日益重要的作用。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the ducal family and high nobility, senior clergy, the knightly class, urban burghers and merchants, peasants, and serfs. The estates assembly played an increasingly important political role.

rulingClass.zh: 维特尔斯巴赫公爵家族、高级教会领袖（尤其是弗赖辛和雷根斯堡主教）、地方贵族与城市贵族
rulingClass.en: The Wittelsbach ducal house, senior churchmen (especially the bishops of Freising and Regensburg), local nobility, and urban patricians

succession.zh: 1506年《长子继承法》确立后，巴伐利亚实行严格长子继承制，终结了此前的分封传统。
succession.en: After the Primogeniture Law of 1506, Bavaria adopted strict primogeniture, ending the previous tradition of partible inheritance.

structure.zh: 公爵府设于慕尼黑，统辖公国内务、财政、司法与军事。等级议会（由贵族、教士、城市代表组成）定期召开，参与税收授权与重大立法。
structure.en: The ducal court was based in Munich and oversaw domestic affairs, finance, justice, and the military. The estates assembly (composed of nobles, clergy, and urban representatives) convened regularly to authorize taxation and participate in major legislation.

function.zh: 最高决策机构，协助公爵处理政务、外交与司法事务。
function.en: The supreme advisory body assisting the duke in governance, diplomacy, and judicial affairs.

function.zh: 管理税收、领地收入、铸币与支出。
function.en: Managed taxes, domain revenues, minting, and expenditures.

function.zh: 审理上诉案件，监督地方法院运作。
function.en: Heard appeals and supervised the operations of local courts.

function.zh: 组织公国军事力量、城堡守备与边防。
function.en: Organized the duchy's military forces, castle garrisons, and border defense.

localAdmin.zh: 公国划分为若干行政区，由公爵任命的法官与行政官管理。城市享有特许状授予的自治权。教会领地由主教自行管理但须服从帝国法律。
localAdmin.en: The duchy was divided into administrative districts managed by ducal-appointed judges and officials. Towns enjoyed chartered self-governance. Church territories were managed by bishops but subject to imperial law.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系结合巴伐利亚习惯法、帝国法律与教会法。1474年巴伐利亚法典改革进一步统一了公国内部法律。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined Bavarian customary law, imperial legislation, and canon law. The 1474 Bavarian legal code reform further unified law within the duchy.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以领地收入、关税、城镇税、啤酒税和等级议会批准的特别税为主。盐矿收入（尤其是巴德赖兴哈尔）是重要财源。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from domain income, customs, town taxes, beer duties, and extraordinary taxes approved by the estates. Salt-mine income (especially from Bad Reichenhall) was a vital source.

religion.zh: 天主教
religion.en: Roman Catholicism

culturalAchievements.zh: 巴伐利亚在哥特式教堂建筑、宗教艺术、慕尼黑大学（1472年建立）的经院学术以及啤酒酿造传统方面表现突出。
culturalAchievements.en: Bavaria excelled in Gothic church architecture, religious art, scholastic scholarship at the University of Munich (founded 1472), and the brewing tradition.

languageFamily.zh: 日耳曼语族（巴伐利亚方言）
languageFamily.en: Germanic (Bavarian dialect)

philosophy.zh: 经院哲学主导，慕尼黑大学和因戈尔施塔特大学为学术中心，人文主义思潮开始渗透。
philosophy.en: Scholastic philosophy dominated, with the universities of Munich and Ingolstadt as scholarly centers, while humanist currents were beginning to penetrate.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（拉丁文为官方与学术语言，德语日益用于行政）
writingSystem.en: Latin script (Latin for official and scholarly use, with German increasingly used in administration)

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以农业（谷物、畜牧）和盐矿为基础，慕尼黑、兰茨胡特等城市的手工业和贸易日益重要。啤酒酿造已成为重要产业。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on agriculture (grain, livestock) and salt mining, with crafts and trade in Munich, Landshut, and other towns growing in importance. Beer brewing had become a significant industry.

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物种植、畜牧业、盐矿开采、啤酒酿造、纺织、金属加工、木材
mainIndustries.en: Grain cultivation, livestock, salt mining, beer brewing, textiles, metalworking, timber

tradeGoods.zh: 盐、啤酒、谷物、牲畜、木材、铁器、纺织品
tradeGoods.en: Salt, beer, grain, livestock, timber, iron goods, textiles

householdWealth.zh: 贵族家庭拥有城堡和领地；城市商人积累房产与商业资本；农民持有土地使用权、牲畜和农具。
householdWealth.en: Noble households held castles and estates; urban merchants accumulated property and commercial capital; peasants held land-use rights, livestock, and farming tools.

economicSystem.zh: 封建领地经济与城市市场经济结合，公爵通过盐矿专营和啤酒税获得可观收入。
economicSystem.en: A combination of feudal domain economy and urban market economy, with the duke drawing significant revenue from salt monopolies and beer duties.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库因阿尔布雷希特四世的统一政策而趋于稳固，盐矿收入提供了稳定的财政基础。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was stabilized by Albert IV's unification policies, with salt-mine income providing a steady fiscal base.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政注重量入为出、维护盐矿专营并通过等级议会协商获得特别税。公爵力图在维持贵族支持与扩大财源之间取得平衡。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized living within means, protecting salt monopolies, and negotiating extraordinary taxes through the estates. The duke sought to balance noble support with expanding revenue sources.

description.zh: 公国军事核心，由封建骑士和家臣骑兵组成。
description.en: The military core of the duchy, composed of feudal knights and retainer cavalry.

description.zh: 由领地征召兵与城市民兵组成的步兵力量。
description.en: Infantry composed of domain levies and urban militia.

description.zh: 初期火炮部队，主要用于攻城，装备尚不精良。
description.en: An early artillery corps, mainly for siege work, with still-rudimentary equipment.

description.zh: 分布于公国各城堡和要塞的守备部队。
description.en: Garrison forces distributed across castles and strongpoints in the duchy.

commanderInChief.zh: 公爵阿尔布雷希特四世，军务由公爵顾问会议中的军事成员协助
commanderInChief.en: Duke Albert IV, with military affairs assisted by the military members of the ducal council

technology.zh: 军备以重骑兵和步兵为主，火器开始引入但尚未成为战场主力。城堡防御体系成熟。
technology.en: Military equipment centered on heavy cavalry and infantry, with firearms being introduced but not yet dominant on the battlefield. Castle defense systems were mature.

threats.zh: 帝国内部诸侯竞争、奥斯曼帝国对中欧的潜在威胁、邻近公国与主教领地的领土争端。
threats.en: Competition among imperial princes, the Ottoman potential threat to Central Europe, and territorial disputes with neighboring duchies and bishoprics.

populationDescription.zh: 人口分布在多瑙河与伊萨尔河流域的肥沃农业区以及慕尼黑、兰茨胡特等城市。阿尔卑斯山麓地区人口较为稀疏。
populationDescription.en: Population was distributed across the fertile Danube and Isar river valleys and cities like Munich and Landshut. The Alpine foothills were more sparsely settled.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为公爵家族、高级贵族与主教；中层包括骑士、城市商人和手工业行会师傅；下层为农民、雇工和农奴。
socialClasses.en: Upper strata included the ducal family, high nobles, and bishops; the middle comprised knights, urban merchants, and guild masters; lower groups were peasants, laborers, and serfs.

allies.zh: 与哈布斯堡家族维持复杂的合作竞争关系；与帝国内其他维特尔斯巴赫领地保持家族联系
allies.en: Maintained a complex cooperative-competitive relationship with the Habsburgs; kept family ties with other Wittelsbach territories in the empire

enemies.zh: 帝国内部的领土争端对手，包括普法尔茨支系和周边主教领地
enemies.en: Territorial dispute rivals within the empire, including the Palatinate branch and neighboring bishoprics

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交以维护公国在帝国中的地位、扩大维特尔斯巴赫家族影响力并防范哈布斯堡势力过度膨胀为目标。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy aimed at preserving the duchy's standing in the empire, expanding Wittelsbach influence, and guarding against excessive Habsburg power.

era.zh: 文艺复兴初期中欧

keyInnovations.zh: 印刷术传入、火器初步引入、盐矿开采技术、啤酒酿造工艺进步与大学教育体系。
keyInnovations.en: Introduction of printing, early adoption of firearms, salt-mining techniques, advances in brewing technology, and university education systems.

strengths.zh: 盐矿收入提供稳定财源、阿尔布雷希特四世的统一政策增强凝聚力、农业基础丰厚、文化教育较发达。
strengths.en: Stable revenue from salt mines, Albert IV's unification policies strengthening cohesion, a rich agricultural base, and relatively developed cultural-educational institutions.

weaknesses.zh: 在帝国政治中地位受哈布斯堡家族压制、经济规模有限、军事力量不足以独立应对奥斯曼威胁。
weaknesses.en: Position in imperial politics constrained by the Habsburgs, limited economic scale, and military insufficient to independently face the Ottoman threat.

outlook.zh: 巴伐利亚将在16世纪成为反宗教改革的重要堡垒，维特尔斯巴赫家族地位将进一步巩固。
outlook.en: Bavaria would become an important bastion of the Counter-Reformation in the 16th century, with the Wittelsbach dynasty further consolidating its position.

description.zh: 神圣罗马帝国内的巴伐利亚公国，维特尔斯巴赫家族正推行统一政策。
description.en: The Duchy of Bavaria within the Holy Roman Empire, with the Wittelsbach dynasty pursuing unification policies.

dynasty.zh: 韦廷王朝（恩内斯廷支系）

governmentForm.zh: 神圣罗马帝国七选侯之一的世袭选侯国，公爵兼帝国选举人，有权参与皇帝选举
governmentForm.en: One of the seven Electorates of the Holy Roman Empire, a hereditary principality whose duke held the right to participate in electing the emperor

socialStructure.zh: 社会由选侯家族与高级贵族、教会高层、骑士、城市商人与手工业者、矿工、农民构成。银矿工人形成了独特的社会群体。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the electoral family and high nobility, senior clergy, knights, urban merchants and artisans, miners, and peasants. Silver miners formed a distinctive social group.

rulingClass.zh: 韦廷恩内斯廷家族、高级教会领袖、地方贵族与银矿地区的特权商人
rulingClass.en: The Ernestine Wettin house, senior churchmen, local nobility, and privileged merchants in silver-mining regions

succession.zh: 选侯位在韦廷家族恩内斯廷支系内世袭继承，须遵循帝国法律与家族协议。
succession.en: The electorate was inherited within the Ernestine branch of the Wettin house, subject to imperial law and family agreements.

structure.zh: 选侯宫廷设于维滕贝格，辅以图林根地区的行政机构。中央设有顾问会议、财政署和法院，等级议会参与重大决策。银矿地区设专门行政机构。
structure.en: The electoral court was based in Wittenberg, supplemented by administrative offices in Thuringia. The center included a council, treasury, and courts, with estates assemblies participating in major decisions. Silver-mining regions had specialized administration.

function.zh: 最高决策咨询机构，协助选侯处理内政外交。
function.en: Supreme advisory body assisting the elector in domestic and foreign affairs.

function.zh: 管理税收、矿山收入、铸币与公共支出。
function.en: Managed taxes, mining revenues, minting, and public expenditures.

function.zh: 审理上诉、监督地方法院。
function.en: Heard appeals and supervised local courts.

localAdmin.zh: 领地分为行政区，由选侯任命的法官与官员管理。城市享有特许自治。矿区设有矿务法庭和专门行政体系。
localAdmin.en: The territory was divided into districts managed by elector-appointed judges and officials. Towns held chartered self-governance. Mining districts had specialized mining courts and administrative systems.

legalSystem.zh: 结合萨克森习惯法、帝国法律、教会法与矿业法的复合法律体系。萨克森镜法典影响深远。
legalSystem.en: A composite legal system combining Saxon customary law, imperial legislation, canon law, and mining law. The Sachsenspiegel remained influential.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以银矿十分之一税、领地收入、关税、城镇税和等级议会批准的特别税为主。矿业收入是核心财源。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from the silver-mining tithe, domain income, customs, town taxes, and extraordinary taxes approved by the estates. Mining income was the core revenue source.

religion.zh: 天主教（但即将成为宗教改革的发源地）
religion.en: Roman Catholicism (but soon to become the cradle of the Reformation)

culturalAchievements.zh: 维滕贝格大学（1502年建立）即将成为宗教改革的思想策源地。卢卡斯·克拉纳赫在选侯赞助下创作了大量文艺复兴风格绘画。
culturalAchievements.en: The University of Wittenberg (founded 1502) was about to become the intellectual cradle of the Reformation. Lucas Cranach the Elder produced numerous Renaissance-style paintings under electoral patronage.

languageFamily.zh: 日耳曼语族（上萨克森方言）
languageFamily.en: Germanic (Upper Saxon dialect)

philosophy.zh: 经院哲学与初期人文主义并存，维滕贝格大学正引入新的学术方法。
philosophy.en: Scholasticism and early humanism coexisted, with the University of Wittenberg introducing new scholarly methods.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（拉丁文与德语并用）
writingSystem.en: Latin script (Latin and German used alongside each other)

gdpDescription.zh: 经济得益于埃尔茨山脉的银矿开采，萨克森是帝国内最富裕的选侯国之一。莱比锡商会贸易与纺织业也很重要。
gdpDescription.en: The economy benefited greatly from silver mining in the Erzgebirge; Saxony was one of the wealthiest electorates in the empire. Leipzig fair trade and textiles were also significant.

mainIndustries.zh: 银矿与其他金属开采、铸币、纺织、莱比锡博览会贸易、农业、印刷业
mainIndustries.en: Silver and other metal mining, minting, textiles, Leipzig fair trade, agriculture, printing

tradeGoods.zh: 白银、矿石、纺织品、谷物、印刷品、木材
tradeGoods.en: Silver, ores, textiles, grain, printed materials, timber

name.zh: 萨克森古尔登与格罗申

householdWealth.zh: 矿主和莱比锡商人可积累大量财富；贵族拥有领地和城堡；矿工收入高于一般农民但面临职业风险；农民持有耕地和牲畜。
householdWealth.en: Mine owners and Leipzig merchants could accumulate substantial wealth; nobles held estates and castles; miners earned more than ordinary peasants but faced occupational hazards; farmers held arable land and livestock.

economicSystem.zh: 矿业经济与封建领地经济并行，莱比锡博览会使萨克森成为中欧重要贸易节点。
economicSystem.en: A mining economy operating alongside the feudal domain economy, with the Leipzig fairs making Saxony an important Central European trade node.

source.zh: 银矿十分之一税与矿业收入
source.en: Silver mining tithe and mining income

source.zh: 城镇税与莱比锡博览会税
source.en: Town taxes and Leipzig fair revenues

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库因银矿收入而相当充裕，是帝国内最富有的选侯国之一。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was quite substantial thanks to silver-mining revenues, making it one of the wealthiest electorates in the empire.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政重视矿业开发投资、大学建设和文化赞助，同时维持适度的军事支出。腓特烈三世以审慎理财著称。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized mining development investment, university building, and cultural patronage, while maintaining moderate military spending. Frederick III was known for prudent financial management.

description.zh: 封建骑士与武装家臣，选侯国军事精锐。
description.en: Feudal knights and armed retainers, the military elite of the electorate.

description.zh: 领地征召兵与城镇民兵。
description.en: Domain levies and town militia.

description.zh: 保护矿区安全的武装力量，兼有初期火炮。
description.en: Armed forces protecting the mining districts, with some early artillery.

commanderInChief.zh: 选侯腓特烈三世，日常军务由领地元帅协调
commanderInChief.en: Elector Frederick III, with daily military affairs coordinated by the territorial marshal

technology.zh: 军备与帝国其他诸侯相当，重骑兵与步兵为主，火器引入中。矿区有独特的防御体系。
technology.en: Military equipment matched other imperial princes, centered on heavy cavalry and infantry, with firearms being adopted. Mining districts had distinctive defensive systems.

threats.zh: 帝国内部诸侯争端、韦廷家族恩内斯廷与阿尔伯廷支系的潜在竞争、奥斯曼帝国对帝国东南翼的远期威胁。
threats.en: Intra-imperial princely disputes, potential rivalry between the Ernestine and Albertine Wettin branches, and the distant Ottoman threat to the empire's southeastern flank.

populationDescription.zh: 人口分布在图林根、迈森和萨克森等核心地区。莱比锡是主要商业城市，维滕贝格为政治与学术中心，埃尔茨山脉矿区人口密度较高。
populationDescription.en: Population was distributed across the core regions of Thuringia, Meissen, and Saxony proper. Leipzig was the main commercial city, Wittenberg the political and academic center, and the Erzgebirge mining districts had relatively high population density.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为选侯家族与高级贵族；中层包括城市商人、矿主、行会师傅与中小贵族；下层为矿工、农民、雇工与农奴。
socialClasses.en: Upper strata comprised the electoral family and high nobles; the middle included urban merchants, mine owners, guild masters, and lesser nobility; lower groups were miners, peasants, laborers, and serfs.

allies.zh: 与帝国内其他韦廷领地保持家族联盟；与部分帝国诸侯在帝国议会中协调立场
allies.en: Maintained family alliances with other Wettin territories in the empire; coordinated positions with some imperial princes in the Reichstag

enemies.zh: 韦廷阿尔伯廷支系是潜在竞争对手；帝国内若干领土争端对手
enemies.en: The Albertine Wettin branch was a potential rival; various territorial dispute opponents within the empire

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交以维护选侯特权、在帝国议会中保持影响力、调解帝国内部纷争为目标。腓特烈三世以外交手腕著称。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy aimed at preserving electoral privileges, maintaining influence in the Reichstag, and mediating intra-imperial disputes. Frederick III was renowned for his diplomatic skill.

era.zh: 文艺复兴初期德意志

keyInnovations.zh: 先进采矿与冶金技术、印刷术的广泛应用、大学教育体系、早期火器技术。
keyInnovations.en: Advanced mining and metallurgical techniques, widespread use of printing, university education systems, and early firearms technology.

strengths.zh: 银矿带来的财富、选侯的帝国地位、维滕贝格大学的学术声望、腓特烈三世的贤明治理。
strengths.en: Wealth from silver mines, electoral status in the empire, academic prestige of the University of Wittenberg, and Frederick III's wise governance.

weaknesses.zh: 韦廷家族内部分裂隐患、过度依赖矿业收入、帝国政治中受制于哈布斯堡。
weaknesses.en: The risk of internal Wettin family split, excessive dependence on mining revenue, and constraints from Habsburg dominance in imperial politics.

outlook.zh: 萨克森即将成为宗教改革运动的核心地区，马丁·路德将在维滕贝格发起改变欧洲历史的运动。
outlook.en: Saxony was about to become the core region of the Reformation movement, with Martin Luther about to launch a movement that would change European history from Wittenberg.

description.zh: 帝国七大选侯之一的萨克森，因银矿而富裕，即将成为宗教改革的摇篮。
description.en: Saxony, one of the empire's seven electorates, wealthy from silver mining and about to become the cradle of the Reformation.

governmentForm.zh: 以亚纳为最高统治者的世袭王国，通过分层次的酋长体系统治
governmentForm.en: A hereditary kingdom headed by the Ya Naa, governing through a hierarchical chieftaincy system

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王族、各级酋长与长老、穆斯林学者与商人、自由农民、工匠与依附人口构成。皮肤等级（酋长等级制）决定政治权力分配。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of royalty, various levels of chiefs and elders, Muslim scholars and merchants, free farmers, artisans, and dependent populations. The skin hierarchy (chieftaincy grading system) determined the distribution of political power.

rulingClass.zh: 亚纳王族、高级酋长（如莫里、萨韦卢古等级）、伊斯兰顾问与宗教领袖
rulingClass.en: The Ya Naa's royal lineage, senior chiefs (such as those of Mion, Savelugu grade), Islamic advisers and religious leaders

succession.zh: 亚纳从有资格的王族候选人中选出，须由选举酋长确认。候选人须已担任若干门级酋长职位。
succession.en: The Ya Naa was selected from eligible royal candidates, requiring confirmation by kingmaker chiefs. Candidates had to have held several gate-level chieftaincy positions.

structure.zh: 中央以亚纳宫廷与皮肤酋长等级体系为核心。全国分为若干由各级酋长管理的行政区。穆斯林文书官在行政和外交中发挥辅助作用。
structure.en: The center comprised the Ya Naa's court and the skin chieftaincy hierarchy. The realm was divided into districts managed by graded chiefs. Muslim scribal officials played supporting roles in administration and diplomacy.

function.zh: 王国最高决策中心，处理政务、仲裁争端、接待使者。
function.en: The kingdom's supreme decision-making center, handling governance, dispute arbitration, and reception of envoys.

function.zh: 由穆斯林学者管理的文书与外交事务处。
function.en: A records and diplomatic affairs office managed by Muslim scholars.

function.zh: 监管市场秩序与贸易征税。
function.en: Supervised market order and trade levies.

localAdmin.zh: 地方由各级酋长按皮肤等级制管理，村社由长老与氏族首领维持秩序。
localAdmin.en: Local areas were managed by graded chiefs under the skin hierarchy, with village order maintained by elders and clan leaders.

legalSystem.zh: 以达贡巴习惯法为主，酋长裁决结合长老协商。穆斯林社区中部分商事纠纷参照伊斯兰法处理。
legalSystem.en: Based primarily on Dagomba customary law, with chiefly adjudication combined with elder consultation. Some commercial disputes in Muslim communities were handled under Islamic law.

taxationSystem.zh: 以农业贡赋、市场税、劳役义务和附庸贡品为主。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from agricultural tribute, market taxes, labor obligations, and vassal tribute.

religion.zh: 传统信仰与伊斯兰教并存，王室采纳伊斯兰元素用于行政和外交
religion.en: Traditional beliefs and Islam coexisted, with the royal house adopting Islamic elements for administration and diplomacy

culturalAchievements.zh: 达贡巴以鼓乐传统（隆戈鼓）、口述史诗、纺织工艺和独特的酋长制度闻名。
culturalAchievements.en: Dagbon was renowned for its drumming tradition (lunsi drums), oral historical epics, weaving crafts, and distinctive chieftaincy system.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系古尔语支（达格巴尼语）
languageFamily.en: Dagbani, Gur branch of the Niger-Congo family

philosophy.zh: 强调祖灵崇拜、社区和谐与酋长权威的政治伦理，兼受伊斯兰宗教观影响。
philosophy.en: Emphasized ancestral veneration, communal harmony, and political ethics of chiefly authority, with growing Islamic religious influence.

writingSystem.zh: 口述传统为主，穆斯林学者使用阿拉伯字母记录
writingSystem.en: Primarily oral tradition, with Muslim scholars using Arabic script for records

gdpDescription.zh: 以旱地农业、畜牧和地区性贸易为基础的经济。达贡巴位于南部森林黄金产区与北方萨赫勒之间的贸易走廊上。
gdpDescription.en: An economy based on dryland agriculture, pastoralism, and regional trade. Dagbon lay on a trade corridor between the southern forest goldfields and the northern Sahel.

mainIndustries.zh: 粟米和薯蓣种植、畜牧、纺织、铁器制造、乳木果加工、区域转口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Millet and yam cultivation, pastoralism, weaving, ironworking, shea butter processing, regional transit trade

tradeGoods.zh: 可乐果（转运）、乳木果、棉织品、牲畜、铁器
tradeGoods.en: Kola nuts (in transit), shea butter, cotton textiles, livestock, iron tools

householdWealth.zh: 普通家庭以牲畜、粮仓和农田为主要资产；酋长拥有更大的田产、随从和贡物积累。
householdWealth.en: Ordinary households held livestock, granaries, and farmland as main assets; chiefs commanded larger holdings, retainers, and accumulated tribute.

economicSystem.zh: 以村社农业和贡赋体系为核心，市场交换在城镇中日益重要。过境贸易为王国带来额外收入。
economicSystem.en: Centered on village agriculture and the tribute system, with market exchange growing in importance in towns. Transit trade brought the kingdom additional revenue.

treasuryDescription.zh: 王室财富以贡物、牲畜和贝壳货币为主要形式，规模有限但足以维持王国运作。
treasuryDescription.en: Royal wealth was held mainly in tribute goods, livestock, and cowrie reserves, limited in scale but sufficient to maintain the kingdom.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以维持酋长体系和王室尊严为优先，保持对过境贸易的吸引力。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized sustaining the chieftaincy system and royal prestige while maintaining attractiveness for transit trade.

description.zh: 亚纳亲军骑兵，是达贡巴军事的核心力量。
description.en: The Ya Naa's personal cavalry, forming the military core of Dagbon.

description.zh: 由各级酋长召集的步兵，装备矛盾和弓箭。
description.en: Infantry gathered by various-level chiefs, armed with spears, shields, and bows.

commanderInChief.zh: 亚纳为最高军事统帅，战争酋长协助指挥
commanderInChief.en: The Ya Naa served as supreme military commander, with war chiefs assisting in command

technology.zh: 以铁矛、弓箭和皮盾为主要武器，骑兵使用从北方贸易获得的马匹。
technology.en: Main weapons were iron spears, bows, and hide shields, with cavalry using horses obtained from northern trade.

threats.zh: 与戈尼亚、曼普鲁西等周边王国的竞争，以及萨赫勒骑兵袭扰。
threats.en: Competition with neighboring kingdoms like Gonja and Mamprusi, and Sahelian cavalry raids.

populationDescription.zh: 人口分布在北加纳草原带的农业定居点和城镇中。叶恩迪为最大聚落。
populationDescription.en: Population was distributed across agricultural settlements and towns in the northern Ghanaian savanna belt. Yendi was the largest settlement.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为亚纳王族与高级酋长；中层包括穆斯林商人学者、工匠与自由农民；下层为附属民和奴隶。
socialClasses.en: Upper strata were the Ya Naa's royalty and senior chiefs; the middle included Muslim merchants-scholars, artisans, and free farmers; lower groups were dependents and slaves.

allies.zh: 与曼普鲁西和纳努姆巴等亲缘王国保持联系
allies.en: Maintained ties with related kingdoms like Mamprusi and Nanumba

enemies.zh: 戈尼亚王国是主要区域竞争对手
enemies.en: The Gonja Kingdom was the main regional rival

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交以维持北南贸易通道安全、扩大对附庸酋邦的控制为目标。
foreignPolicy.en: Diplomacy aimed at maintaining the safety of north-south trade corridors and expanding control over subordinate chieftaincies.

era.zh: 西非铁器时代晚期

keyInnovations.zh: 冶铁技术、骑兵组织、旱地农业体系与鼓语通讯系统。
keyInnovations.en: Ironworking, cavalry organization, dryland agricultural systems, and drum communication networks.

strengths.zh: 成熟的酋长制提供稳定治理、位于南北贸易走廊上的地理优势、骑兵力量在区域中具有优势。
strengths.en: A mature chieftaincy system providing stable governance, geographical advantage on the north-south trade corridor, and cavalry forces giving regional advantage.

weaknesses.zh: 经济规模较小、人口有限、远离海岸与主要国际贸易路线。
weaknesses.en: Small economic scale, limited population, and distance from the coast and major international trade routes.

outlook.zh: 达贡巴将在16-18世纪继续发展，但最终面临阿散蒂帝国等南方势力的压力。
outlook.en: Dagbon would continue developing through the 16th-18th centuries but eventually face pressure from southern powers like the Ashanti Empire.

description.zh: 北加纳的达贡巴王国，以酋长等级制和区域贸易闻名。
description.en: The Dagbon Kingdom of northern Ghana, known for its chieftaincy hierarchy and regional trade.

governmentForm.zh: 母系继承制的王权国家，国王由选举产生并受贵族议事会制约
governmentForm.en: A matrilineal monarchy with an elected king constrained by a council of nobles

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王族（通过母系继承确立地位）、地方贵族与省级首领、商人、工匠、自由农民和奴隶构成。母系亲属关系在社会组织中具有核心地位。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of royalty (with status established through matrilineal descent), local nobles and provincial chiefs, merchants, artisans, free farmers, and slaves. Matrilineal kinship was central to social organization.

rulingClass.zh: 马洛安果王族、省级首领（马福克）、贸易商人首领与宗教仪式专家
rulingClass.en: The Ma Loango royal lineage, provincial chiefs (mafouks), leading trade merchants, and religious ritual specialists

succession.zh: 国王从合格的母系王族候选人中由贵族议事会选举产生，非严格世袭长子制。
succession.en: The king was elected from eligible matrilineal royal candidates by a council of nobles, not through strict primogeniture.

structure.zh: 中央以马洛安果宫廷为核心，设有贵族议事会（选王、废王功能）。全国分为若干省，各省由马福克（省长）管理。
structure.en: The center comprised the Ma Loango's court, with a nobles' council (which could elect or depose the king). The realm was divided into provinces, each managed by a mafouk (governor).

function.zh: 王国最高决策与仲裁机构。
function.en: Supreme decision-making and arbitration body of the kingdom.

function.zh: 管理沿海贸易、市场和关税。
function.en: Managed coastal trade, markets, and customs.

function.zh: 协调各省首领的贡赋和行政事务。
function.en: Coordinated tribute and administrative affairs of provincial chiefs.

localAdmin.zh: 省级由马福克管理，村社由氏族长老和地方首领维持秩序。母系氏族组织在地方治理中发挥重要作用。
localAdmin.en: Provinces were managed by mafouks, with village order maintained by clan elders and local chiefs. Matrilineal clan organization played an important role in local governance.

legalSystem.zh: 以洛安果习惯法为主，由首领和长老裁决。神判与宗教仪式在司法中发挥作用。
legalSystem.en: Based primarily on Loango customary law, adjudicated by chiefs and elders. Ordeals and religious rituals played roles in justice.

taxationSystem.zh: 以农业贡赋、贸易税、劳役和附庸贡品为主。沿海贸易关税日益重要。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from agricultural tribute, trade taxes, labor obligations, and vassal tribute. Coastal trade customs were growing in importance.

religion.zh: 班图传统宗教（恩基西信仰）
religion.en: Bantu traditional religion (nkisi spirit worship)

culturalAchievements.zh: 洛安果以精美的编织工艺（拉菲亚棕榈布）、木雕、冶金术和复杂的政治制度闻名。
culturalAchievements.en: Loango was renowned for fine weaving (raffia palm cloth), wood carving, metallurgy, and a sophisticated political system.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支（基刚果语/维利语）
languageFamily.en: Bantu branch of Niger-Congo (Kikongo/Vili)

philosophy.zh: 重视祖灵崇拜、恩基西精灵信仰与社区和谐，母系亲属关系构成社会伦理基础。
philosophy.en: Emphasized ancestral veneration, nkisi spirit beliefs, and communal harmony, with matrilineal kinship forming the ethical foundation of society.

writingSystem.zh: 无文字系统，依赖口述传统和符号记录
writingSystem.en: No writing system; relied on oral tradition and symbolic records

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以农业、渔业和沿海贸易为基础。拉菲亚布和铜制品是重要出口商品。16世纪初与葡萄牙人的接触正开始改变贸易格局。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on agriculture, fishing, and coastal trade. Raffia cloth and copper goods were important exports. Early 16th-century contact with the Portuguese was beginning to change trade patterns.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业（薯蓣、棕榈油）、渔业、拉菲亚纺织、冶铜与铁器制造、沿海贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (yams, palm oil), fishing, raffia weaving, copper and ironworking, coastal trade

tradeGoods.zh: 拉菲亚布、铜制品、象牙、奴隶、棕榈油、红木
tradeGoods.en: Raffia cloth, copper goods, ivory, slaves, palm oil, redwood

householdWealth.zh: 普通家庭以农田、渔具和拉菲亚布存量为资产；贵族和商人拥有奴隶、铜器和更大的贸易存货。
householdWealth.en: Ordinary households held farmland, fishing equipment, and raffia cloth stocks as assets; nobles and merchants possessed slaves, copper goods, and larger trade inventories.

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济：村社农业、氏族土地关系与沿海贸易网络结合。国家通过贡赋和贸易税参与经济。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy combining village agriculture, clan land relations, and coastal trade networks. The state participated through tribute and trade taxes.

treasuryDescription.zh: 王室财富以恩津布贝壳、铜器、拉菲亚布与象牙形式积累。
treasuryDescription.en: Royal wealth was accumulated in nzimbu shells, copper goods, raffia cloth, and ivory.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以维持王室权威和沿海贸易吸引力为优先。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized maintaining royal authority and the attractiveness of coastal trade.

description.zh: 国王直属武装力量。
description.en: The king's personal armed force.

description.zh: 各省首领召集的步兵，战时集结。
description.en: Infantry assembled by provincial chiefs in wartime.

commanderInChief.zh: 马洛安果为最高统帅
commanderInChief.en: The Ma Loango served as supreme commander

technology.zh: 以铁矛、刀剑、弓箭和木盾为主。军事技术在班图地区属中等水平。
technology.en: Main weapons were iron spears, swords, bows, and wooden shields. Military technology was middling by Bantu regional standards.

threats.zh: 与刚果王国的竞争、内陆部族袭扰、日益增长的欧洲殖民势力接触。
threats.en: Competition with the Kongo Kingdom, hinterland tribal raiding, and growing contact with European colonial powers.

populationDescription.zh: 人口沿刚果海岸及内陆森林-草原过渡带分布。沿海城镇为贸易中心。
populationDescription.en: Population was distributed along the Congo coast and the inland forest-savanna transition zone. Coastal towns served as trade centers.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为王族与高级首领；中层为商人、工匠和自由农民；下层为附属民和奴隶。
socialClasses.en: Upper strata were royalty and senior chiefs; the middle comprised merchants, artisans, and free farmers; lower groups were dependents and slaves.

allies.zh: 与恩戈约和卡孔果等同文化姊妹王国保持联系
allies.en: Maintained ties with culturally related sister kingdoms like Ngoyo and Kakongo

enemies.zh: 与刚果王国存在势力范围竞争
enemies.en: Competing for spheres of influence with the Kongo Kingdom

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交以维持沿海贸易自主权和在刚果地区的影响力为目标。
foreignPolicy.en: Diplomacy aimed at maintaining coastal trade autonomy and influence in the greater Congo region.

era.zh: 西非铁器时代晚期

keyInnovations.zh: 冶铁与冶铜技术、拉菲亚纺织工艺、沿海航运与海洋资源利用。
keyInnovations.en: Ironworking and copper smelting, raffia weaving techniques, coastal navigation, and marine resource exploitation.

strengths.zh: 沿海贸易地位有利、精美的手工业传统、母系制度提供的政治灵活性。
strengths.en: Advantageous coastal trade position, fine craft traditions, and political flexibility provided by the matrilineal system.

weaknesses.zh: 军事力量有限、经济规模较小、面对欧洲殖民者的技术差距。
weaknesses.en: Limited military power, small economic scale, and a technological gap vis-à-vis European colonizers.

outlook.zh: 洛安果将在17-18世纪因大西洋奴隶贸易而成为重要贸易口岸，但也将因此面临深刻的社会变迁。
outlook.en: Loango would become an important trade port in the 17th-18th centuries through the Atlantic slave trade, but would also face profound social transformation as a result.

description.zh: 刚果海岸的洛安果王国，以沿海贸易和拉菲亚布工艺闻名。
description.en: The Loango Kingdom on the Congo coast, known for coastal trade and raffia cloth craftsmanship.

title.zh: 葡萄牙探险家卡布拉尔到达巴西

description.zh: 佩德罗·卡布拉尔率领葡萄牙舰队在前往印度途中意外到达巴西海岸。他宣称这片土地归葡萄牙所有，开启了葡萄牙对南美洲的殖民历史。
description.en: Pedro Álvares Cabral, leading a Portuguese fleet bound for India, accidentally reached the coast of Brazil. He claimed the land for Portugal, initiating Portuguese colonization of South America.

title.zh: 米开朗基罗开始创作大卫像

description.zh: 米开朗基罗在佛罗伦萨开始雕刻大理石巨像《大卫》。这座高达5.17米的杰作于1504年完成，成为文艺复兴雕塑的巅峰之作和人文主义精神的象征。
description.en: Michelangelo began sculpting the marble statue of David in Florence. Completed in 1504, this 5.17-meter masterpiece became the pinnacle of Renaissance sculpture and a symbol of humanist ideals.

description.zh: 伊斯玛仪一世征服波斯大部分地区并在大不里士加冕为沙，建立萨法维王朝。他将什叶派十二伊玛目派定为国教，深刻改变了伊朗和中东的宗教格局。
description.en: Ismail I conquered most of Persia and crowned himself Shah in Tabriz, founding the Safavid dynasty. He declared Twelver Shia Islam the state religion, profoundly reshaping the religious landscape of Iran and the Middle East.

title.zh: 达·芬奇开始绘制《蒙娜丽莎》
title.en: Leonardo da Vinci Begins Painting the Mona Lisa

description.zh: 列奥纳多·达·芬奇在佛罗伦萨开始创作《蒙娜丽莎》。这幅运用晕涂法的肖像画成为西方艺术史上最著名的作品，体现了文艺复兴时期科学与艺术的完美结合。
description.en: Leonardo da Vinci began painting the Mona Lisa in Florence. Using his sfumato technique, this portrait became the most famous work in Western art history, embodying the Renaissance fusion of science and art.

title.zh: 葡萄牙建立东非沿海据点
title.en: Portugal Establishes East African Coastal Posts

description.zh: 葡萄牙海军攻占基尔瓦和蒙巴萨等东非沿海城市，建立一系列贸易据点。葡萄牙打破了阿拉伯商人对印度洋贸易的垄断，重塑了东非的商业网络。
description.en: Portuguese naval forces captured East African coastal cities including Kilwa and Mombasa, establishing a chain of trading posts. Portugal broke the Arab monopoly on Indian Ocean trade, reshaping East African commercial networks.

description.zh: 德国制图师马丁·瓦尔德泽米勒在其世界地图中首次以意大利探险家亚美利哥·韦斯普奇的名字将新大陆命名为「美洲」。这张地图极大地改变了欧洲人的世界观。
description.en: German cartographer Martin Waldseemüller first named the New World 'America' after Italian explorer Amerigo Vespucci on his world map. This map dramatically altered European understanding of world geography.

description.zh: 葡萄牙将领阿方索·德·阿尔布克尔克率军攻占印度果阿。果阿成为葡属印度的首府和亚洲最重要的葡萄牙殖民据点，也是天主教向东方传播的桥头堡。
description.en: Portuguese commander Afonso de Albuquerque captured Goa in India. Goa became the capital of Portuguese India and the most important Portuguese colonial outpost in Asia, serving as a bridgehead for Catholic expansion eastward.

description.zh: 阿尔布克尔克率葡萄牙舰队攻陷马六甲苏丹国首都。马六甲的陷落打破了穆斯林对东南亚香料贸易的控制，也标志着欧洲殖民势力进入东南亚。
description.en: Albuquerque's Portuguese fleet captured the capital of the Malacca Sultanate. The fall of Malacca broke Muslim control over Southeast Asian spice trade and marked the arrival of European colonial power in Southeast Asia.

description.zh: 西班牙探险家巴尔沃亚穿越巴拿马地峡，成为第一个从美洲看到太平洋的欧洲人。他将这片广阔的水域命名为「南海」，这一发现激发了寻找西行亚洲航路的热潮。
description.en: Spanish explorer Vasco Núñez de Balboa crossed the Isthmus of Panama, becoming the first European to see the Pacific Ocean from the Americas. He named it the 'South Sea,' inspiring the quest for a westward route to Asia.

title.zh: 查尔迪兰战役：奥斯曼击败萨法维
title.en: Battle of Chaldiran: Ottomans Defeat Safavids

description.zh: 奥斯曼帝国苏丹塞利姆一世在查尔迪兰战役中凭借火器优势击败萨法维波斯。这场战役确立了奥斯曼在安纳托利亚东部的霸权，也划定了逊尼派-什叶派的地缘分界。
description.en: Ottoman Sultan Selim I defeated Safavid Persia at the Battle of Chaldiran using superior firearms. This battle established Ottoman dominance in eastern Anatolia and drew the geopolitical boundary between Sunni and Shia spheres.

title.zh: 马丁·路德发表《九十五条论纲》
title.en: Martin Luther Posts the Ninety-Five Theses

description.zh: 马丁·路德在维滕贝格城堡教堂张贴《九十五条论纲》，抨击天主教会出售赎罪券的行为。这一事件引发了宗教改革运动，永久性地分裂了西方基督教世界。
description.en: Martin Luther posted his Ninety-Five Theses at Wittenberg Castle Church, attacking the Catholic Church's sale of indulgences. This event triggered the Protestant Reformation, permanently splitting Western Christendom.

title.zh: 奥斯曼帝国征服马穆鲁克埃及

description.zh: 奥斯曼苏丹塞利姆一世率军征服马穆鲁克苏丹国，将埃及、叙利亚和汉志纳入奥斯曼版图。奥斯曼由此控制了伊斯兰圣地麦加和麦地那，成为穆斯林世界的领袖。
description.en: Ottoman Sultan Selim I conquered the Mamluk Sultanate, incorporating Egypt, Syria, and the Hejaz into the Ottoman Empire. The Ottomans thereby gained control of the Islamic holy cities of Mecca and Medina, becoming leaders of the Muslim world.

title.zh: 科尔特斯抵达阿兹特克帝国首都

description.zh: 西班牙征服者埃尔南·科尔特斯率领六百余人进入阿兹特克帝国首都特诺奇蒂特兰。蒙特祖马二世以为来者可能是神的使者，将科尔特斯迎入城中，这最终导致了帝国的覆灭。
description.en: Spanish conquistador Hernán Cortés led over 600 men into Tenochtitlan, the Aztec capital. Montezuma II, believing the arrivals might be divine messengers, welcomed Cortés into the city, ultimately leading to the empire's destruction.

description.zh: 费迪南德·麦哲伦率领西班牙舰队从塞维利亚出发，寻找通往香料群岛的西行航路。虽然麦哲伦本人在途中阵亡，但船队于1522年完成了人类首次环球航行。
description.en: Ferdinand Magellan departed Seville with a Spanish fleet seeking a westward route to the Spice Islands. Though Magellan himself was killed en route, his fleet completed the first circumnavigation of the globe in 1522.

description.zh: 科尔特斯率西班牙军队和大量原住民盟军围攻特诺奇蒂特兰。在长达三个月的围城后，阿兹特克末代皇帝夸乌特莫克被俘，阿兹特克帝国覆灭，墨西哥沦为西班牙殖民地。
description.en: Cortés besieged Tenochtitlan with Spanish troops and numerous indigenous allies. After a three-month siege, the last Aztec emperor Cuauhtémoc was captured, the Aztec Empire fell, and Mexico became a Spanish colony.

description.zh: 帖木儿后裔巴布尔在帕尼帕特战役中击败德里苏丹国洛迪王朝，建立莫卧儿帝国。巴布尔以少胜多，火器的运用在此战中发挥了关键作用。
description.en: Babur, a descendant of Timur, defeated the Lodi dynasty of the Delhi Sultanate at the Battle of Panipat, founding the Mughal Empire. Babur's smaller force prevailed largely through the effective use of firearms.

title.zh: 莫哈奇战役：奥斯曼击败匈牙利
title.en: Battle of Mohács: Ottomans Defeat Hungary

description.zh: 奥斯曼苏丹苏莱曼大帝在莫哈奇战役中大败匈牙利军队，匈牙利国王路易二世阵亡。此战导致匈牙利被瓜分，奥斯曼帝国势力深入中欧。
description.en: Ottoman Sultan Suleiman the Magnificent crushed the Hungarian army at the Battle of Mohács, killing King Louis II. This battle led to the partition of Hungary and Ottoman expansion deep into Central Europe.

title.zh: 哥白尼日心说手稿流传

description.zh: 尼古拉·哥白尼的日心说理论手稿《小注解》开始在欧洲学者间流传。虽然完整著作《天体运行论》直到1543年才出版，但日心说已经开始挑战传统地心说宇宙观。
description.en: Nicolaus Copernicus's heliocentric manuscript Commentariolus circulated among European scholars. Though his complete work De Revolutionibus was not published until 1543, the heliocentric theory had already begun challenging the traditional geocentric worldview.

description.zh: 西班牙征服者弗朗西斯科·皮萨罗在卡哈马卡伏击并俘获印加皇帝阿塔瓦尔帕。皮萨罗以区区168人击败数万印加军队，导致南美最大帝国的迅速瓦解。
description.en: Spanish conquistador Francisco Pizarro ambushed and captured Inca Emperor Atahualpa at Cajamarca. With just 168 men, Pizarro defeated tens of thousands of Inca warriors, leading to the rapid collapse of South America's largest empire.

title.zh: 英格兰宗教改革：亨利八世脱离罗马教廷
title.en: English Reformation: Henry VIII Breaks with Rome

description.zh: 英格兰国王亨利八世颁布《至尊法》，宣布自己为英格兰教会的最高首脑。此举源于教皇拒绝批准其离婚请求，标志着英格兰与罗马天主教的正式决裂。
description.en: English King Henry VIII enacted the Act of Supremacy, declaring himself Supreme Head of the Church of England. This break with Rome, triggered by the Pope's refusal to annul his marriage, marked England's formal split from Roman Catholicism.

title.zh: 明朝正德帝与宦官专权
title.en: Ming Zhengde Emperor and Eunuch Dominance

description.zh: 明武宗正德帝即位后宠信宦官刘瑾，导致朝政腐败。刘瑾专擅朝政，打压异己，虽最终被诛杀，但宦官干政成为明朝中后期政治的痼疾。
description.en: After the Zhengde Emperor's accession, the Ming court fell under the dominance of eunuch Liu Jin, leading to corruption. Liu Jin monopolized power and suppressed dissent; though eventually executed, eunuch interference became a chronic malady of mid-to-late Ming politics.

title.en: Suleiman the Magnificent Ascends the Throne

description.zh: 苏莱曼一世继位为奥斯曼帝国苏丹，开启了奥斯曼帝国最辉煌的时代。在他长达46年的统治期间，帝国疆域达到极盛，法律体系和文化艺术也达到巅峰。
description.en: Suleiman I became Sultan of the Ottoman Empire, inaugurating its most glorious era. During his 46-year reign, the empire reached its greatest territorial extent, while its legal system and cultural arts achieved their zenith.

title.zh: 宗喀巴改革后藏传佛教格鲁派传播
title.en: Spread of Gelug School of Tibetan Buddhism

description.zh: 宗喀巴创立的格鲁派在西藏持续扩大影响力，强调严格的戒律和哲学研究。格鲁派寺院如哲蚌寺、色拉寺等成为重要的学术和政治中心。
description.en: The Gelug school founded by Tsongkhapa continued expanding its influence in Tibet, emphasizing strict monastic discipline and philosophical study. Gelug monasteries like Drepung and Sera became important centers of scholarship and political power.

title.zh: 普雷韦扎海战：奥斯曼称霸地中海
title.en: Battle of Preveza: Ottoman Mediterranean Dominance

description.zh: 奥斯曼海军将领巴巴罗萨在普雷韦扎海战中击败由西班牙、威尼斯和教皇联合组成的基督教舰队。此战确立了奥斯曼帝国在地中海的海上霸权。
description.en: Ottoman admiral Barbarossa defeated a combined Christian fleet of Spain, Venice, and the Papal States at the Battle of Preveza. This victory established Ottoman naval supremacy in the Mediterranean Sea.
